title: SEO Specialist (Australian Businesses – Ongoing Work)
description:
We are currently looking for an experienced and reliable SEO Specialist to join our team and assist with ongoing SEO campaigns for clients across Australia.



Our agency works primarily with trades and service-based businesses such as electricians, plumbers, builders, landscapers, and other local service providers. Because of this, we are specifically looking for someone who has previous experience working with Australian businesses, understands local SEO, and knows how to generate real, measurable results.



This role will involve both strategy and execution, with a strong focus on local SEO performance, content, and ongoing optimisation. There is consistent ongoing work available, and we are ideally looking for someone who can become a long-term part of our team.



Responsibilities:



• Conduct SEO audits and identify opportunities for improvement

• Perform keyword research focused on local Australian search intent

• Implement on-page SEO optimisations (meta titles, descriptions, headings, internal linking, etc.)

• Write and publish SEO-optimised blog content 

• Assist with Google Business Profile (GBP) management including posts, updates, and optimisation (training can be provided)

• Build local citations and directory listings to improve authority and NAP consistency

• Support location page creation and expansion targeting specific suburbs and service areas

• Carry out basic technical SEO checks (Search Console, errors, page speed, etc.)

• Provide monthly reporting including rankings, traffic insights, and work completed

• Work alongside our team to continuously improve campaign performance



Requirements:



• Proven experience in SEO

• Experience working with Australian businesses (preferably trades or service-based industries)

• Strong understanding of local SEO and Google rankings

• Ability to write or assist with SEO content (blogs, service pages, etc.)

• Good written and spoken English communication skills

• Experience with tools such as Google Search Console, Google Analytics, and SEO platforms

• Strong attention to detail and ability to follow structured processes

• Ability to show proof of results (rankings, traffic growth, lead generation, etc.)



To confirm that you have read the full job listing, please include the phrase “I listen to Dylan” somewhere in your application.



When applying, please include examples of SEO work you have completed, particularly for Australian businesses, along with any results, case studies, or data you can share.



We are looking for someone who can become a reliable and results-driven part of our team, helping us grow rankings, traffic, and leads for our clients through consistent and effective SEO work.

title: SHOPIFY Senior Full Stack Engineer – Luxury eCommerce
description:
Full Stack Web Developer (AI-Powered eCommerce – Luxury Brand)



Location: Remote / Hybrid

Employment Type: Optional based on Candidate



About the Opportunity



We are building a new, world-class luxury eCommerce website for a hyper-scale global fashion brand — and we’re looking for a highly creative Full Stack Web Developer to help build the new theme and create operational automations for customer service and inventory management. 



This is not a maintenance role. This is a build-from-the-ground-up opportunity.



You will collaborate with a global team of designers, product leaders, and engineers to craft a refined, high-performance digital flagship that reflects the sophistication of a luxury brand while integrating modern AI capabilities.



If you combine exceptional design sensitivity with strong frontend and backend engineering skills, this role is for you.



We are hiring a highly creative Full Stack Web Developer to help power the next generation of luxury eCommerce experiences for a hyper-scale global fashion brand.



This ongoing role sits at the intersection of premium digital experience, web development and AI innovation, and intelligent automation. You’ll help craft seamless, high-performance online journeys that reflect the elegance of a luxury brand while leveraging advanced AI technologies to create business solutions.



If you are passionate about building and website and refined, scalable, AI-enhanced eCommerce systems — this role is built for you.



What You’ll Build



High-performance luxury eCommerce storefronts

AI-powered personalization and product discovery experiences

Intelligent automation across merchandising, operations, and marketing

Seamless checkout and payment integrations

Scalable backend systems supporting global traffic

API-driven integrations with ERP, CRM, and logistics systems



Key Responsibilities



Collaborate closely with product, UX, and creative teams to build a brand-new global website

Translate high-fidelity luxury designs into pixel-perfect, responsive experiences

Architect scalable frontend and backend systems from the ground up

Contribute to technical architecture decisions and platform selection



Exceptional Frontend Development

Develop refined, high-performance UI using modern frameworks (React, Next.js, or similar)

Ensure flawless responsiveness across mobile, tablet, and desktop

Implement smooth animations, transitions, and premium micro-interactions

Maintain strict attention to visual detail, typography, and performance



Robust Backend Engineering

Design and develop secure, scalable backend services (Node.js, Python, or equivalent)

Build APIs to support product catalog, checkout, customer accounts, and integrations

Integrate payment gateways, CMS, ERP, CRM, and third-party systems

Optimize performance for high global traffic volumes



What We’re Looking For



Core eCommerce Expertise

Exceptional Attention to Detail and Proven Design Skills

Experience building or scaling eCommerce platforms

Strong understanding of conversion optimization and UX for luxury consumers

Familiarity with headless commerce architecture

Payment gateway integrations and order management systems



Technical Skills - Be the Best with Web Development and Design!



React / Next.js / Vue (or similar)

Node.js, Python, or equivalent backend framework

REST or GraphQL APIs

SQL & NoSQL databases

Cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure)

AI & Automation (Preferred)

Experience integrating APIs from platforms like OpenAI

Curiosity about AI-driven personalization and smart commerce experiences



What Makes You Stand Out



Experience with luxury or premium retail brands

Knowledge of global eCommerce scaling challenges

Experience with AI-driven customer journey optimization

Strong product sense and attention to design detail

Ability to balance innovation with brand sophistication

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field — and/or equivalent industry experience.



What Success Looks Like



Global Luxury Website Design in a Hyper Growth Phase

Seamless luxury digital experiences with exceptional performance

Launching a visually stunning, high-performance luxury eCommerce website

Elevated digital experiences that reflect premium brand standards

Automated workflows that reduce operational friction

Scalable systems capable of handling global demand spikes

Launching a visually stunning, high-performance luxury eCommerce website

Seamless collaboration across global teams

Clean, scalable codebase supporting future growth

Elevated digital experiences that reflect premium brand standards



What We Offer



Local Hours and Fabulous Team Culture

Competitive salary + performance incentives

Exposure to a global, high-performing team

Ownership of high-impact, visible features

Creative freedom to experiment with AI-driven innovation

Opportunity to shape the digital future of a high growth luxury brand

title: Student Enrollment & Sales Advisor
description:
About Otips


 helps international students already in the U.S. navigate school placement, change of status, Day 1 CPT, F-1 transfers, housing, medical insurance, and other essential student services. We've helped 800+ students from 15+ countries and we're growing fast.

This is a mission-driven company built by someone who went through the international student experience firsthand — and knew it could be done better.



About the Role

We're looking for a smart, proactive, and sales-minded Student Enrollment & Sales Advisor who can connect with students, understand their situation, explain our services clearly, follow up consistently, and help convert leads into paying clients.

This is not a passive customer service role. You'll be part advisor, part sales consultant, part enrollment coordinator — someone who takes ownership and gets things done.



What You'll Do



Reply to leads and students through WhatsApp,
, CRM, and social media

Talk to prospective students, understand their situation and goals, and recommend the right Otips service

Explain our services clearly and help students feel confident moving forward

Follow up with leads consistently and help close sales

Collect documents and guide students through the enrollment process

Coordinate with internal tea
mbers and partner schools

Keep CRM records accurate and up to date

Support students before, during, and after enrollment

Escalate legal or complex immigration questions to the right tea
mber





What We're Looking For



Strong spoken and written English

Experience in customer service, sales, admissions, enrollment, or student advising

Confident communicator who builds trust quickly

Someone who can consult and sell — not just answer questions

Strong follow-up habits and attention to detail

Comfortable managing multiple leads and cases simultaneously

Able to work independently and take ownership without being micromanaged

Friendly, professional, and dependable

Experience with international students, U.S.-based clients, or education is a big plus

Familiarity with CRM tools, Google Sheets, WhatsApp, and remote work preferred





Compensation



Base salary: $800–$1,200/month USD, depending on experience

Performance incentives based on conversions and enrollments

Room to grow as the company grows





Work Schedule



Full-time

Must be available Monday–Friday, with at least 4 hours overlap with Eastern Time (ET) business hours (9 AM–6 PM ET)

Some flexibility for evening or weekend follow-up may be needed





Why Join Us



Work directly with the founder of a fast-growing company

Fully remote role

We've helped 800+ students from 15+ countries — this work has real impact

Performance incentives on top of base salary

Long-term growth opportunity as we scale





To Apply, Please Send:



Your resume

A short introduction about yourself

Your relevant experience in customer service, sales, enrollment, or advising

Your expected monthly salary

Your availability and time zone (ET overlap required)

A 1–2 minute voice or video introduction in English

Answer this question: A student in the U.S. is interested in changing their status to F-1 and wants to know how Otips can help. How would you respond?



Applications without the voice/video intro and scenario answer will not be reviewed.

title: Remote Medical Front Desk
description:
JOB TITLE: Medical Front Desk (U.S. Healthcare Hawaii)



We’re a U.S. medical clinic hiring a long-term remote VA for front desk + scheduling. Work hours will be from 730AM HST to 1200 PM HST and from 130PM HST to 430PM HST



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

- Answer/return patient calls, schedule/reschedule, confirm appointments

- Insurance verification, basic benefits questions, collect required info

- Document clearly inside the EHR and keep tasks organized



REQUIREMENTS (BUT FLEXIBLE)

- 1+ year U.S. healthcare front desk / scheduling / patient access experience (remote or in-clinic)

- Strong spoken + written English (natural, easy for U.S. patients to understand)

- Comfortable with: insurance verification, referrals, copays/deductibles

- Reliable internet, quiet workspace, headset; HIPAA-minded work habits

- NO agencies/teams. You must be the person doing the work (no outsourcing).



HOW TO APPLY (FOLLOW EXACTLY OR DISQUALIFIED)

Start your message with: AVC



Include ALL of the following:

1) Resume/CV link (PDF via Google Drive/Dropbox; set to “anyone with link can view”)

2) Answer these (real examples only; 4–8 sentences each):

- Q1: A prior auth was denied and the patient was upset. What did you do step-by-step?

- Q2: You caught a scheduling/insurance mistake before the visit. How did you fix it?

3) Loom video link (60–90 sec, camera ON):

- State your U.S. healthcare role + years

- Say this line naturally: “Thank you for calling our clinic—this is [Name]. May I have your insurance company and member ID so I can verify benefits before we schedule?”



Missing resume link, missing Loom, audio-only video, agency/team applications, or generic/AI-style answers = disqualified.

title: E-commerce Video Editor (Short-Form Ads)
description:
We’re a DTC e-commerce brand. Our Creative Strategists write the scripts/briefs and handle creators. You will receive the raw content and assemble launch-ready ads.



What you’ll do



Edit short-form ads (Meta/TikTok/Reels/Shorts) from UGC + product b-roll following the script/brief.



Build a strong hook in 0–3s, structure Problem ? Proof/Demo ? CTA.



Add burned-in captions (SRT), sound fixes, basic motion/text, logos/end cards.



Deliver variants (different hooks, CTAs, lengths 15s/30s; formats 9:16 + 1:1).



Create simple thumbnails and export platform-ready files (bitrate, loudness, safe zones).



Keep files organized: naming, versions, folders, project file cleanliness.



Must-have



Proven e-commerce/DTC ad editing experience (not weddings/vlogs).



Premiere Pro or CapCut Pro (After Effects/Descript a plus).



Reliable English communication, stable internet, and a machine that exports fast.



Can hit deadlines and work from written briefs with minimal supervision.



Nice to have



ElevenLabs (TTS/VO) experience for quick voiceover swaps.



Light color/audio cleanup, simple motion graphics.



Schedule & Pay



Full-time (40 hrs/week). $1,700 USD/month 



Performance bonus for winning creatives.





How to apply (strict) — applications missing any item are ignored



Subject line: ECOM EDITOR – Your Name.



1. Send 3 links to short-form e-commerce ads you personally edited. For each, write one line on what you did to improve the hook/retention.



2. Attach one exported MP4 + SRT for any ad you edited and a screenshot of your timeline (to confirm you did the work).



3. Share a Speedtest screenshot and your PC specs.



4. Confirm you can work 40 hrs/week and your monthly rate.

Our website and SEO foundations are already set up, and we are now looking for an experienced **Senior SEO Specialist** to help audit, optimize, and scale our organic traffic.

title: Senior Magento 2 Full-Stack Developer (Microservices Focus)
description:
We are seeking a highly experienced Senior Full-Stack Magento 2 Developer with strong architectural skills to help scale and evolve our e-commerce platform.



This role goes beyond standard Magento development. The ideal candidate will be capable of transitioning a Magento-based system into a modern microservices architecture, while maintaining and improving existing functionality.



Key Responsibilities



Design, develop, and maintain Magento 2 (Adobe Commerce) applications

Lead the migration from Magento monolith to microservices architecture

Architect scalable backend systems and APIs

Develop and maintain frontend components and user experience

Apply patches, upgrades, and performance optimizations

Integrate Magento and microservices with external systems (ERP, APIs, etc.)

Ensure system reliability, scalability, and maintainability

Requirements



5+ years experience as a Magento 2 Full-Stack Developer

Proven expertise in PHP, JavaScript, HTML, CSS

Strong experience with Magento Enterprise (Adobe Commerce)

Demonstrated experience in system architecture and microservices design

Experience building and consuming REST/GraphQL APIs

Experience working with large and complex product catalogs

Strong understanding of scalable, distributed systems

Fluent in English (written and verbal)

Nice to Have



Experience migrating monolithic platforms to microservices architecture

Experience in the automotive aftermarket industry (vehicle fitment data is a plus)

Magento (Adobe Commerce) certification

Experience with Adobe Commerce Cloud

Experience with AWS or similar cloud infrastructure

Familiarity with Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines

What We Offer



100% Remote Work

Full-time position

Opportunity to lead a major architectural transformation

Work on complex, high-scale e-commerce systems

Ideal Candidate



You are not just a developer—you are a problem solver and system thinker who can:



Work within Magento today

Design what comes next

Execute a clean transition to a scalable microservices ecosystem

title: Sourcing Assistant - AU Hours
description:
Sourcing Assistant (Contractor, AU Hours)

Location: Remote (positions available for Sydney time zone)

Engagement Type: Full-time Contractor

Initial Review Period: 3 months

Reports to: Sourcing Manager



About the Company

We are a leading buyer's agent in Australia, specialising in investment properties across metropolitan and regional areas. Our team is dedicated to identifying and securing high-potential properties for our clients, backed by thorough research, detailed analysis and expert insights.



Role Overview

The Sourcing Assistant is an important part of our team, responsible for assisting in the initial due diligence and tracking of property deals to ensure they meet our standards. You will also handle ad hoc administrative and research tasks that support smooth sourcing operations.



This role involves regular communication with solicitors, conveyancers and sales agents, so strong English communication skills, both written and verbal, are essential. You will need excellent attention to detail, the ability to work independently, and a strong working relationship with the Sourcing Manager. It’s a fast-paced role that suits someone organised, proactive and adaptable.



Key Responsibilities

- Complete initial due diligence for incoming property deals as directed by the Sourcing Manager

- Track and update the progress of property deals from sourcing through to contract stage

- Prepare detailed summaries including property and agent comments, statistical analysis, quotes and risk assessments (such as flood or fire maps)

- Communicate professionally with solicitors, conveyancers and sales agents to confirm deal details, request information and support transactions

- Compile relevant documentation such as property comparisons and rental appraisal letters, maintaining organised records in Google Drive

- Assist with ad hoc administrative and research tasks to support sourcing and wider team operations

- Transition to assistant-level interactions with property agents after gaining experience

- Work closely with the Sourcing Manager to ensure clear communication and alignment on property evaluations



Qualifications and Experience

- Experience in real estate or property-related work is preferred but not essential

- Familiarity with Australian property tools (for example RP Data or CoreLogic) is highly regarded

- Strong administrative and organisational skills with the ability to manage multiple priorities



Skills

- Excellent written and verbal English communication

- Exceptional attention to detail

- Strong analytical and problem-solving ability

- Ability to work independently and deliver work efficiently

- Comfortable working closely with the Sourcing Manager in a one-on-one setting



Work Environment

- This is a remote role that requires a reliable internet connection during Australian business hours. 

- This is a contractor role, not an employee position. You will be engaged under a service agreement and responsible for your own tax and insurance obligations.



Career Progression

You’ll receive one-on-one training and ongoing support, with opportunities to grow within the company.

title: Ad Creative Owner / Direct Response Creative Producer
description:
Machete Muay Thai is looking for a hands-on Ad Creative Owner to take responsibility for our paid social creative from idea to final ad.

This is not a role for someone who only gives strategy, writes a few hooks, or sends briefs for someone else to figure out.

We are not looking for an agency.



We want one person who can own the creative process end to end and help us produce ads that actually perform.



What this role is

You will be responsible for turning our offers, customer avatar, gym footage, testimonials, and brand message into direct-response ads built to convert.



That means you can:

come up with angles and concepts

write hooks, scripts, copy, and CTAs

create shot lists and filming direction

work with our team on what needs to be filmed

review raw footage

give clear editing direction (bonus pay for editing ability)

help shape the final ad

create static ads

iterate based on what is working



This role is NOT for you if

you only do strategy

you only write copy

you only make things look pretty

you need someone else to translate your ideas into a usable creative process

you have no proof of direct-response work

you cannot show finished ads you personally helped lead from concept to final output



What we need help with

We run paid ads for beginner offers at Machete Muay Thai in Penrith, NSW.

Our ideal creative operator understands how to make ads for people who:

feel unfit

lack structure

are sick of normal gyms

want something that actually challenges them

are interested in Muay Thai but may feel intimidated starting



You must be able to create ads that feel:

direct

sharp

emotionally accurate

beginner-friendly without being soft

performance-focused, not generic fitness fluff



Responsibilities

Own the ad creative pipeline from concept to final output

Develop fresh angles, hooks, and ad concepts

Write primary text, headlines, scripts, and CTA variations

Build clear briefs and shot lists for our team

Direct creative execution remotely

Review footage and edit/ provide edit feedback

Help improve creative based on results

Work collaboratively with our internal team to keep quality high and output consistent



Requirements

Proven direct-response experience for Meta ads

Strong portfolio of ads you personally led

Ability to explain your thinking clearly

Strong copywriting and creative strategy skills

Good understanding of hooks, personas, objections, and offer positioning

Ability to take ownership, not wait to be spoon-fed

Strong communication and turnaround time

Comfortable working with a premium combat sports / fitness brand



To apply

Do not send a generic application.

We want to see proof that you can think and execute.

Please send:

A short intro video about who you are and what you do

3–5 examples of finished ads you personally led from concept to final output

A breakdown of what parts of the process you personally owned on each ad

Any results you can share

Your rate and availability

A short loom video walking through one ad and explaining:

the angle

the hook

why it worked

what you personally owned in the process



Application test

Using this avatar:

Beginner male in Penrith who feels unfit, lacks structure, is sick of normal gyms, and wants something that actually challenges him



Create:

3 hooks

2 ad angles

1 short script

1 image ad concept

1 video ad concept

a simple shot list / creative direction for how it should be filmed

Important

We are not looking for:

an agency

a pure strategist

a pure editor

a content creator who does not understand direct response

We are looking for someone who can own the process, improve the creative, and help us make ads that convert.

If that sounds like you, apply properly.

title: Product Research VA (Fast Scanning Task – Easy & Long-Term Job)
description:
Hello,



We are looking for a Virtual Assistant to help with product selection for our e-commerce stores.



This is a simple and repeatable task.

No experience required – we will train you.





YOUR TASK:



- Review product lists (we provide everything)

- Look at product image and title

- Quickly d
: GOOD or SKIP



Important:

- Work fast

- Do NOT overthink

- If unsure ? SKIP





DAILY TARGET:



- Review 4,000 products per day

- Around 20 stores per day

- Max 15 minutes per store



Estimated work time:

- Around 4–6 hours per day





WHAT IS A GOOD PRODUCT:



- Easy to understand instantly (image + title)

- Clear what the product is

- Generic (no brand)

- Clean and simple

- Useful OR visually appealing



Important rule:

If you need to THINK what the product is ? SKIP





WHAT TO SKIP:



- Confusing products

- Messy or unclear titles

- Branded products

- Too many variations (sizes, colors, etc.)

- Seasonal products (Christmas, Halloween, etc.)





WORK STRUCTURE:



- Work can be done daily (7 days), but schedule is flexible

- You can organize your own working time



Most important:

- Complete 200 good products per store

- Around 20 stores per day



We have tested this task:

- ~100 products = ~6 minutes

- ~200 products = ~12 minutes



So speed is very important.



Do not overthink.

Work fast and follow the rules.





WORK TIME (IMPORTANT):



Preferred working time:

- During EU nighttime



Example:

- 22:00 – 06:00 German time

- 05:00 – 13:00 Philippines time



This is not strict, but preferred.





PAYMENT:



- $15 per day (if daily target is completed)



Paid weekly.





WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



- Fast worker

- Can follow simple rules

- Reliable and consistent

- Focused



No German required

Basic English is enough





LONG TERM:



Good performance = higher pay and long-term work





TEST TASK:



We will send you a small product list.



You must:

- Select GOOD products

- Skip BAD products

- Give a short reason





HOW TO APPLY:



Send:

1. Short introduction

2. Any experience (optional)

3. Write: FAST WORKER READY

title: Full-Time Senior SketchUp & Cost Planning Specialist (Remote)
description:
We are hiring a highly skilled SketchUp and Cost Planning specialist to support structured design and construction workflows across residential and commercial projects.



You will be working directly with engineers, designers, and project managers to produce accurate models and contract-aligned cost outputs.



This is a high-performance role. You must be experienced, precise, and able to operate independently.



Role Overview

This role combines technical modelling and commercial estimation.

Your work will directly support pricing, design development, and project delivery.



You will be responsible for:

• Producing fully structured SketchUp models suitable for reliable quantity take-offs

• Preparing construction-level BOQs aligned with drawings and specifications

• Developing and maintaining structured Excel cost models

• Managing revisions and ensuring accuracy across design changes

• Communicating clearly with internal and external stakeholders



Requirements (Do Not Apply If You Do Not Meet These)

• Advanced SketchUp: models structured for accurate quantity extraction and documentation

• Strong understanding of construction systems, sequencing, and BOQs

• Advanced Excel: linked cost models, structured formats, revision control

• Fluent English (written and spoken, client-facing level)

• High attention to detail and strong accountability

• Able to work full-time and meet deadlines consistently



What Success Looks Like

• Models are clean, organised, and usable for take-offs without rework

• Quantities are accurate and aligned with drawings and scope

• Cost plans are structured, traceable, and commercially reliable

• Communication is clear, concise, and professional



Application Instructions (Strict)

To apply, you must complete ALL steps below:



Step 1 – Answer Questions

Include answers to:

• How do you structure a SketchUp model for accurate take-offs?

• How do you ensure quantities are correct?

• Describe a BOQ you have prepared

• How do you structure an Excel cost plan?



Step 2 – Complete Test Task

Submit:

• SketchUp model (organised for take-offs)

• Excel quantity take-off

• Excel cost plan



Step 3 – Include This Code

At the top of your application, write: SKETCH-CP-2026

Applications without this code will not be reviewed.



Important

• Only experienced applicants will be considered

• Low-quality or incomplete applications will be ignored

• This is a long-term, full-time role with consistent workload



Apply now with your portfolio, answers, and test submission.

description:

title: GoHighLevel (GHL) Automation & Workflow Specialist – Dubsado + Zapier Migration Project
description:
Remote | Project-Based | Potential Ongoing Work



We are looking for an experienced GoHighLevel (GHL) automation specialist to migrate and rebuild our existing systems from Dubsado and Zapier into our white-label GHL platform (Alvéya).



This is a project-based role with the potential for ongoing work as the platform grows.



Project Overview



We currently use:



• Dubsado for proposals, contracts, and client workflows

• Zapier for onboarding automation and system integrations



We are transitioning these systems into Alvéya (GHL) and are looking for someone who can:



? rebuild workflows

? connect automations

? simplify and optimise the system



What You’ll Be Responsible For



System Migration



• Review existing Dubsado workflows and Zapier automations

• Rebuild workflows inside GoHighLevel

• Replace or replicate Zapier integrations within GHL where possible



Automation & Integration Setup



• Set up triggers, workflows, tags, and pipelines

• Recreate onboarding automations currently handled via Zapier

• Ensure systems communicate correctly (forms,
s, CRM updates)



Proposals & Contracts



• Recreate proposals and contracts inside GHL

• Ensure forms and agreements function smoothly



Client Journey Build



• Map and build the full client journey:

Lead ? Proposal ? Onboarding ? Project ? Completion



• Ensure the experience is seamless for both client and team



System Optimisation



• Identify ways to simplify workflows

• Reduce reliance on Zapier where possible

• Ensure the system is scalable as the business grows



Ideal Candidate



You are:



• highly experienced with GoHighLevel workflows and automation

• confident working with Zapier and integrations

• able to think strategically about system design (not just execution)

• detail-oriented and organised

• experienced with service-based business workflows



Experience migrating from Dubsado, HoneyBook, or similar CRM systems is highly preferred.



Bonus (Not Required)



• Experience with white-label GHL platforms

• Experience with digital agencies or website projects

• Familiarity with onboarding systems and client lifecycle design



Project Scope



This is a full system migration and optimisation project, including:



• workflows

• automations

• Zapier integrations

• proposals

• contracts

• pipelines



We are looking for someone who can take ownership of the system build from start to finish.



How to Apply



Please include:



• a brief overview of your experience with GoHighLevel and Zapier

• examples of workflows or automations you have built

• any experience migrating from Dubsado or similar systems



To confirm you have read this description, please include the word “automated” in your application.



Important



This role requires hands-on experience with GoHighLevel and automation systems.



General virtual assistants without technical automation experience will not be considered.

title: Online Math/Science Teacher(Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Cinematic Travel Video Editor (Color Grading + Storytelling + Motion)
description:
OVERVIEW

We’re building a premium travel/adventure brand focused on cinematic, high-energy content.



Think:

- Red Bull-style intensity

- Emotional storytelling

- Clean, high-end visuals

- We’re not looking for a basic editor.

- We’re looking for someone who can take raw footage and turn it into something that feels alive.



WHAT YOU’LL DO

- Edit short-form travel/adventure videos (15–60s primarily)

- Create strong pacing, flow, and emotional build

- Apply cinematic color grading (not just LUTs)

- Add sound design (impacts, risers, ambient layers)

- Use motion (speed ramps, masking, transitions) intentionally—not excessively

- Maintain a consistent, premium visual style across content



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

Required:

- Strong editing fundamentals (cuts, pacing, music sync)

- Understanding of color grading workflow (LOG ? Rec709 ? final look)

- Ability to create cinematic, high-end visuals



Experience with:

- DaVinci Resolve (preferred for color)

- Adobe Premiere Pro or similar

- Ability to follow direction + bring creative input



Strong bonus:

- Experience with Adobe After Effects (masking, tracking, motion)

- Sound design experience

- Travel/adventure content experience



WHAT WE DON’T WANT

- Template-based editing

- Overuse of flashy transitions

- “TikTok style” with no story

- Heavy reliance on LUTs without understanding



EXAMPLES OF STYLE

We want content similar to:

- Fast-paced travel edits

- Cinematic adventure sequences

- Emotion + intensity + movement

- (We’ll send references after application)



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (IMPORTANT)

- To be considered, you must answer ALL of the following:



1. Portfolio

- Send 2–5 of your best cinematic edits (not talking head / podcast clips)



2. Color Grading

- Explain your full workflow for turning flat LOG footage into a cinematic final image.

- (Be specific. Avoid vague answers.)



3. Improvement Thinking

- If you had to take one of your edits from 8/10 ? 10/10, what would you change?



4. Creative Thinking

- How would you make a video feel more intense and cinematic without changing the footage?



5. Code Word

- Start your application with: “CINEMATIC”

- (If you don’t include this, we won’t review your application.)



COMPENSATION

- Depends on skill level

- Opportunity for long-term work and increased volume

- Potential to grow into lead editor role



FINAL NOTE

We care about:

- Taste

- Intentionality

- Storytelling

- Not just technical ability.

title: E-commerce Data Scraping Specialist
description:
We’re looking for a data scraping specialist who understands how to collect, organize, and maintain useful data from e-commerce platforms.



This role is focused on gathering product, pricing, competitor, seller, and marketplace data from platforms such as Shopee, Lazada, and other online selling channels. You should be comfortable working with structured data, handling large product catalogs, and delivering accurate, clean outputs that can support business decisions.



What you’ll handle



Collect product, pricing, seller, review, and competitor data from Shopee, Lazada, and other e-commerce platforms

Extract and organize data in a clear and usable format

Monitor changes in listings, pricing, stock, promotions, and marketplace activity

Build and maintain scraping workflows for recurring data collection

Clean, structure, and validate data before delivery

Work with our team to improve data quality, speed, and reliability over time



What we want



Strong experience with data scraping and web data collection

Experience scraping e-commerce or marketplace platforms

Good knowledge of Python and scraping / automation frameworks

Must know how to use Claude Code and work with it effectively

Comfortable using developer tools needed for data scraping and automation

Ability to deliver clean, accurate, and well-structured datasets

Understanding of product pages, seller listings, reviews, pricing, and marketplace data points

Attention to detail and ability to follow instructions carefully

Reliable communication and consistent delivery



Tools you should know



Python

Scrapy

Playwright, Selenium, or Puppeteer

BeautifulSoup

APIs and JSON data handling

Git and GitHub

Claude Code

Browser developer tools

CSV, Excel, or Google Sheets

Databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, or SQLite

Basic proxy and session management is a plus

Docker or server deployment knowledge is a plus



How to apply



Send:

“Data Pro”

one direct portfolio link

to your best scraping, automation, or data extraction work



Accepted platforms:

GitHub, Upwork, personal portfolio, or case study links



Please do not send Google Drive, Dropbox, or other file-sharing links.



About us



We are an e-commerce business selling through marketplaces such as Shopee, Lazada, eBay, and our own website. We are building for long-term growth and want someone who is serious about improving, contributing, and growing with the company.



Compensation can be reviewed after 12 months based on performance, consistency, and overall contribution.

title: Sales Account Executive
description:
How to Apply

* Send your most updated resume to 



About us:



Gushwork.ai builds AI Agents that help small and medium businesses automate their entire inbound marketing stack — from SEO and website content to reviews, blogs, and lead funnels. Our current focus is the manufacturing and industrial distributors industry.



In plain English: we’re replacing bloated marketing agencies with intelligent, always-on software.



Backed by Lightspeed, SIG, Beenext, and B Capital, Gushwork.ai is one of the fastest-growing AI companies globally.



In just a year, we’ve grown to $1.5M ARR and are scaling fast toward $15M ARR in the next 12 months — helping thousands of small businesses grow smarter, not harder.



The Role:



We’re looking for a closer who thrives in fast-paced, high-velocity sales environments. You’ll own the full sales cycle from discovery to close for qualified meetings booked by our 10-person BDR team. This is a quota-carrying role where you’ll close 4-8 deals monthly, with deal cycles ranging from 1-3 calls.



Working Hours: US Shift (9:00 AM - 6:00 PM EST)

Work Mode: Remote



What You’ll Do:



- Run discovery calls with qualified prospects (OEMs, distributors, manufacturers) to uncover pain points around lead generation and digital presence

- Deliver compelling demos that connect our AI SEO solution to specific business outcomes and revenue impact

- Navigate buying committees within SMB organizations, typically engaging with Marketing Directors, Sales Leaders, and C-suite

- Close deals on 12-month contracts with ACV of $5k-$25k, meeting or exceeding monthly quota

- Manage pipeline with discipline—forecast accurately, maintain detailed CRM hygiene, and move deals forward with urgency

- Partner with Growth Managers post-sale to ensure smooth handoffs and identify expansion opportunities

- Iterate on sales methodology by sharing wins/losses and collaborating on improving conversion rates



What Success Looks Like:



- Month 1-2: Ramp on product, market, and sales process; close your first 2-3 deals

- Month 3+: Consistently hit/exceed quota of 4-8 closed deals monthly

- Ongoing: Maintain 30%+ demo-to-close conversion rate and sub-30 day sales cycles



You’re a Great Fit If You Have:



- 2-4 years of closing experience in B2B SaaS, MarTech, or digital services

- Proven track record hitting/exceeding quota in a high-velocity sales environment

- SMB sales chops—you know how to build urgency, handle objections, and close without lengthy procurement cycles

- Consultative selling skills—you diagnose before prescribing and can articulate ROI clearly

- Comfort with ambiguity—you’re joining an early-stage startup where adaptability matters

- CRM proficiency (Zoho, HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.) and strong process discipline

- Excellent English communication skills for engaging with global prospects

title: Short-Form Video Editor — Cinematic AI Instagram/TikTok
description:
JOB TITLE: Short-Form Video Editor — Cinematic AI Instagram/TikTok

SALARY: $800–1,100 USD/month (based on portfolio & skills)

TYPE: Full-time (40 hours/week), Remote (Philippines)

SCHEDULE: Async, with Vancouver (PST) overlap for feedback



---



THE VISION



Prismiera - luxury jewelry.



We're going to be building cinematic para-social content on Instagram/TikTok, with flexibility to pivot formats based on what the platform is rewarding. Realistic, stylized, dark feminine aesthetic, mythology underneath, luxury fashion on the surface. Think if a high-end fashion editorial had lore and a storyline.



The content follows a simple rhythm: our heroine talks to camera like a real person — casual, smart, magnetic — then something cinematic happens that changes everything you just saw. The audience replays it.



We're hiring for taste first, artistry, cinematography, humor, and technical execution. We provide all AI tools and training if needed. You bring the instinct.



THE CONTENT MIX



65% VIBE & SCENARIO — The reel a woman sends to her group chat with no caption.

25% CINEMATIC SKITS — High-end execution of viral formats and humor. The premise can be unhinged; the visuals never break luxury canon.

10% SENSORY / EXPERIMENTAL — Layered, fast, loop-optimized. The algorithmic wildcard.



THE STYLE



YES: Aspirational. Lethal elegance. Fashion-edit energy. Dark femininity. Music-driven impact. Cinematic skits.



NO: Generic CapCut presets. Generic motivational reels. Anything made in Canva.



You instinctively know the difference between "luxury" and "cheap." Between powerful and loud. That instinct is what we're hiring for.



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Produce original IG Reels and TikToks — parasocial content into cinematic reveal

- Build cinematic skits around our AI goddess personas using trending formats and dark humor

- Integrate AI-generated characters into edits so they feel like they belong in the scene, not pasted on top

- Learn and use frontier AI generation tools (we provide paid accounts + training if needed)

- Music-sync editing — cuts married to the beat, rhythm as a storytelling weapon

- Design for platform behavior — what gets saved on IG, what loops on TikTok

- Ramp from 3–5 pieces/week to 6–10 at steady state



REQUIREMENTS



- Portfolio that makes us stop scrolling — we're evaluating taste, creative vision, and editing execution as a package. All three matter.

- Music-sync editing instinct (AMVs, fashion reels, phonk edits, fan edits — any genre)

- Work that has atmospheric, cinematic depth — layered compositions, light/shadow awareness, visual storytelling that goes beyond straight cuts and generic Capcut presets. Whether you achieve this in After Effects, Premiere, DaVinci, or anything else doesn't matter. The output is everything.

- Strong English, clear async communication, reliable deadlines

- Coachable — takes direct feedback and iterates fast



BONUS (affects your rate): After Effects proficiency, AI generation experience (Kling, Veo, Seedream), color grading, typography, sound design



---



HOW THIS ROLE FITS



Other editors handle cinematic YouTube production — you own social media. Same mythology, same brand, different platform behavior. Each editor has a distinct lane, and yours is how Prismiera looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok.



---



SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS



RAM: 16GB minimum (32GB preferred) + SSD

Reliable high-speed internet (upload speed matters)

Must run your editing software and browser-based AI tools simultaneously



---



THE DEAL



- Paid trial: $150/week standard. For candidates with strong existing signal, we may run a shorter 2-day trial at $100 for a single deliverable.

- All AI tool subscriptions provided

- Creative ownership from day one — you define how a luxury brand looks on social

- Direct feedback on every edit

- Rate growth tied to capability growth

- A brand worth building — Prismiera launches soon, with two more AI-native brands incubating behind it



COMPENSATION: $800–1,100 USD/month based on portfolio and skills. Editors with compositing ability and AI generation experience start higher. Bi-weekly payments after confirmed hire.



---



OWNERSHIP & CONFIDENTIALITY



All outputs (edits, project files, prompts, generated assets, persona visuals) are Prismiera property and must remain confidential.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Subject line: PRISMIERA SOCIAL — [Your favorite anime]

Use 7+ apply points.



1. The Vibe Test. Link to ONE edit that is aspirational, aesthetic, fashion-adjacent, or a skit showing platform-native instinct. The feeling and execution matters.



2. The Rhythm Test. Link to ONE music-driven edit. (Can overlap with #1.)



3. Portfolio link (optional). If you have a reel, channel, or portfolio beyond the two links above that you are proud of, drop it here!



4. The Two-Act Test (3–5 sentences total). You're given footage of our AI heroine sitting in a dimly lit restaurant, a dark atmospheric beat, and her voice talking casually about something she noticed about the people around her. Act 1 is the conversation. Act 2 is the cinematic reveal. Pitch both halves — what does she say, what does the audience see, and what is the reveal? Humorous? Epic?



5. AI Experience (1–2 sentences). Your experience with generative AI tools. If none, let us know.



6. Hardware. CPU / GPU / RAM / upload speed.



7. Turnaround. Given existing footage, potential music track, and an established template — how long for a 15–20s piece? How long for a 45s stitched cinematic AI video?



8. The Rewrite. Make this dark, powerful, and aspirational: "She is really cool and strong and she wins."

title: MARKETING LEAD - Online Jobs - (Part time Ongoing)?
description:
Marketing Lead (Hands-on)



20 hours per week + Bonueses | Ongoing | Remote | Opportunity for additional hours



We’re looking for a hands-on Marketing Lead who enjoys both strategy and execution — someone who wants real ownership, not just tasks.



This is a unique opportunity to work directly with leadership and help shape the growth of three premium brands in the medical and wellness space:



• Dripclub – premium IV and wellness clinics

• Dripclub Mobile – licensed mobile healthcare services

• Evolve Medical Solutions – medical devices and B2B clinical supply



Each brand has a different audience and focus, and your role is to bring clarity, consistency, and 
ntum across all three.



WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT



• Work directly with leadership, and your ideas will be heard and implemented

• Be part of a collaborative, dynamic team that values input and initiative

• No micromanagement, we trust you to own your work

• Opportunity to grow into more hours and responsibility over time

• Exposure to both B2C and B2B marketing

• Build systems and strategy, not just “post content”



We are building something long-term, and we’re looking for someone who wants to grow with us.





ABOUT THE ROLE



This is not a “post and boost” role.



You’ll be responsible for both thinking and doing, translating direction into action and seeing campaigns through end-to-end.



This is a high-impact part-time role, focused on priority initiatives — not unrealistic workload expectations.





WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING



Strategy & Execution



• Translate leadership direction into clear marketing actions

• Plan and execute campaigns across social,
, and digital channels

• Balance quick wins with long-term brand positioning

• Maintain consistency across all brand touchpoints





Performance & Optimisation



• Track meaningful metrics (engagement, conversions, lead quality)

• Adjust campaigns based on performance data

• Provide simple, clear insights to guide decisions





Collaboration



• Work closely with leadership and tea
mbers

• Share ideas, improvements, and feedback openly

• Contribute to a fast-moving, solutions-focused environment





TOOLS YOU’LL USE



We currently use:

• GoHighLevel (campaigns, workflows, funnels)

• Trello (planning and collaboration)

• Canva (design and content)

• Blaze AI (content support)



Experience with these is helpful, but not essential, you must be comfortable learning new tools quickly.





WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR



Essential



• Hands-on marketing experience (strategy + execution)

• Strong written and conversational English

• Highly organised with strong attention to detail

• Able to take ownership and follow through

• Comfortable working directly with leadership

• Focused on outcomes, not just activity





Highly Regarded (but not required)



• Experience in healthcare, medical, or regulated industries

• Experience with paid ads,
 marketing, or funnels

• Ability to interpret and explain campaign performance



Note: Experience in compliance-heavy industries is a bonus, not a requirement; we can teach this.





WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE (FIRST 90 DAYS)



• Clear and structured campaigns across all three brands

• Consistent, on-brand content and messaging

• Improved visibility of marketing performance

• Early traction in engagement, leads, and audience growth





HOURS, PAY & BENEFITS



• 20 hours per week (with opportunity for additional hours)

• Long-term, ongoing role

• USD $12/hour (based on experience)

• Performance-based bonus opportunities

• Paid days off (for long-term tea
mbers)

• Flexible working hours (aligned with ACST where required)





HOW TO APPLY



We respect your time; concise answers are absolutely fine.



Please include:

- A short note on why this role interests you

- Examples of campaigns you’ve worked on (what you did + results)

- Your availability and preferred working hours



(Optional) Your thoughts on the difference in audience between:

1. Dripclub

2. Dripclub Mobile

3. Evolve Medical Solutions





FINAL NOTE



We’re looking for someone who is:

- proactive

- detail-oriented

- ideas-driven

- and ready to take ownership



If you’re someone who enjoys building, improving, and being part of a growing business, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Two (2) Video Editor for ZERA Ethiopian Black Seed Oil (Unaware VSL Style)
description:
At Sole Assistant, we place VAs into stable, long-term roles with US-based ecommerce businesses. We have hired and placed more than 300 VAs in the last 3 years and currently support over 75 active roles. Our mission is to give talented Filipino VAs a real career pathway, not a short-term gig.

If you are coachable, fast, and eager to grow, this is the right opportunity for you.



Why Work With Sole Assistant:



• Stable full-time work with long-term clients

• Clear SOPs so you always know what to do

• Growth opportunities as you improve your skills

• 3-month employment guarantee (Average employment is 12+ months)

• We will replace you with another company if let go

We have a large network of businesses actively hiring, which allows us to place strong candidates quickly.



Rate: $5/hour | Around PHP46,000+ per month



The Opportunity

-ZERA is a fast-growing health supplement brand specializing in high-potency Ethiopian Black Seed Oil. We are seeking a talented and highly skilled video editor to join our direct-response marketing team. This is a remote, full-time contract role focused on producing high-volume, direct-response video ads for Meta platforms 
/Instagram).



-You will be responsible for creating compelling, story-driven "Unaware VSL" (Video Sales Letter) style ads modeled after a highly specific and successful format. This is an opportunity to become a key player in a high-growth brand and see your work directly impact business results.



The Brand: ZERA

-Product: ZERA Ethiopian Black Seed Oil

-Form: 3000mg high-potency softgels

-Key Differentiators: Cold-pressed from Ethiopian Nigella sativa seeds, naturally rich in thymoquinone (TQ), and delivered in an easy-to-swallow softgel format that eliminates the harsh taste of liquid oils.



The Job

-Core Responsibilities

Deliverables: Produce one batch of content per day

Length: Each video will be 1.5 to 3 minutes long.

Format: All ads must be in 9:16 vertical format for Meta (Instagram Reels,
 Stories, etc.).



-Workflow & Tools

Scripts: All ad scripts will be written and provided by the brand. You will not be responsible for copywriting.

Voiceover: All voiceover audio will be generated using ElevenLabs and provided by the brand. You must be comfortable working with and pacing to AI-generated audio.

Footage: B-roll will be sourced from Gridbank and other stock footage libraries. You will be responsible for selecting the most impactful clips to match the script and pacing.

Software: You may use your preferred editing software (e.g., Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve).

Brand Assets: A full suite of brand assets (logo, color palette, etc.) will be provided.



-The Style: Unaware VSL

This is the most critical component of the job. We are not creating typical social media ads. We are creating direct-response video sales letters designed for a "completely unaware" audience. This means the ad does not lead with the product. Instead, it enters a conversation already happening in the viewer's mind.



The style is based on a specific, high-performing ad format. A reference video will be provided, but the core elements are as follows:

Structure & Flow

-The ad follows a precise narrative structure designed to build curiosity, establish a problem, and then reveal the product as the inevitable solution.



Pacing & Tone

-Pacing: Cuts should be quick, generally every 2-4 seconds, to maintain high engagement. The pace should feel urgent but allow the voiceover to remain the primary focus.

-Voiceover: The tone is conversational, serious, and confessional. It should feel like one person sharing a powerful secret, not a corporate announcement. The provided ElevenLabs audio will match this style.

-Music: There should be no music, or it should be extremely subtle and atmospheric. The voiceover must dominate the audio mix.



On-Screen Elements

-Captions: This is a signature element. Captions must be synced word-for-word or phrase-by-phrase with the voiceover. Use a large, bold, sans-serif font. One key "power word" in each caption phrase should be highlighted with a specific brand color (to be provided). The rest of the text is white. Captions are placed directly on the video with no background box



B-Roll Usage

B-roll selection is critical. It must be a dynamic mix of different styles to keep the viewer engaged:

-Emotional/Problem Footage: Clips that visually represent the viewer's pain point (e.g., someone looking stressed, footage of joint pain).

-Medical/Authority Footage: Stock clips of doctors, scientists, labs, and medical settings to build credibility.

-Mechanism Animations: 3D medical animations or scientific visualizations that explain how the product works (e.g., showing blood cells in an artery).

-Ingredient/Process Footage: Clips of the raw ingredient (black seed) and the production process (cold-pressing).

-UGC-Style Proof: Authentic, phone-shot style clips of people using the product or showing their results.



Approval & Revisions

-All final cuts will be approved directly by the client (Gavin)

-We expect a higher number of revisions during the first 1-2 weeks as we dial in the precise style and pacing.

-After this initial period, we aim for no more than 1-2 minor revisions per batch Compensation

-This is a monthly retainer-based position. The specific amount will be determined based on experience and a paid trial period.

-After a successful 1-month trial, a performance-based bonus structure will be implemented, tied to a percentage of ad spend.



What We're Looking For in an Editor

-You understand the "Unaware VSL" format. You can demonstrate an ability to replicate the structure and pacing of the reference ad with precision.

-You have a strong sense of rhythm and pacing. You know when to make a cut to emphasize a point and how to use b-roll to build and release tension.

-You are a storyteller. You can look at a script and a folder of b-roll and see the emotional arc of the story.

-You are reliable and fast. You can consistently deliver a batch of 4 high-quality ads every day.

-You are communicative and coachable. You can take direct feedback and iterate quickly without ego.

-Experience with health and wellness supplement ads is highly preferred.

-Experience working with AI-generated voiceover is a plus.



How to Apply:

1. Fill out this Screening form:

2. Message us on OnlineJobs with this exact subject line: [Your Full Name] – [Your Favorite Shoe Brand]

3. At the end of your OnlineJobs message, answer this question in 3 to 5 sentences

-What do you think this job actually looks like day-to-day

title: Junior Bookkeeper & Administrative Assistant
description:
We are seeking a highly skilled and dependable Junior Bookkeeper & Administrative Assistant. This role requires someone who is strong in bookkeeping, excellent in communication, and highly organized, with the ability to multitask and support administrative needs.

The ideal candidate is someone who can seamlessly step into an established system, manage financial responsibilities with minimal supervision, and confidently handle client-facing and administrative tasks.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:



Bookkeeping & Financial Management

 > Handle full-cycle bookkeeping with accuracy and consistency

 > Maintain financial records, including purchases, sales, receipts, and payments.

 > Manage invoice processing and accounts payable/receivable.

 > Assist in the preparation of monthly financial reports.

 > Reconcile bank statements and other financial accounts

 > Ensure compliance with financial regulations and company policies.

 > Work with QuickBooks accounting software to record and analyze financial data.

 > Collaborate with other tea
mbers to streamline accounting processes.

 > Provide support during financial audits.

 

Administrative & Executive Assistant Duties

 > File and organize financial and administrative documents

 > Monitor and manage
 inboxes as assigned

 > Draft professional
s and correspondence on behalf of executives

 > Assist with general administrative tasks and ad hoc requests

 > Support day-to-day operational needs of the client



Communication & Client Support

 > Communicate clearly and professionally with internal teams and external vendors

 > Demonstrate discretion and professionalism when handling sensitive information



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS:



  Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field.

  Strong bookkeeping experience (preferably full-cycle) - strong knowledge of bookkeeping practices and principles.

  Proficiency in accounting software (QuickBooks Online, QuickBooks Desktop, ZohoBooks, Xero) 

  Proficiency in Microsoft Office and Google Workspace, especially Excel and Spreadsheets.

  Detail-oriented with strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

  Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment.

  Demonstrated ability to manage tasks independently, showcasing responsibility and initiative - Proven ability to multitask.

  Strong organizational and time-management skills

  Excellent written and verbal English communication skills and interpersonal skills.

  Capacity to handle sensitive financial information discreetly and ethically.

  Tech-savvy and quick to learn new systems



IDEAL CANDIDATE TRAITS:



  Reliable, proactive, and detail-oriented

  Professional and confident communicator

  Adaptable and capable of stepping into a critical role

  Able to work independently with minimal supervision

title: SEO & AI Search Growth Specialist — U.S. Law Firm
description:

This is not a content-posting role. We are seeking someone who can plan and execute a strategy that results in real consultations and retained cases.



What Success Looks Like



Increased qualified leads (not just traffic)

Strong visibility for high-intent legal searches

Dominance in local search for target practice areas

Measurable growth in consultations and retained clients



Responsibilities



Strategy & Execution

Conduct full SEO audit and develop a growth plan

Identify high-value legal search opportunities

Optimize site architecture, pages, and conversion paths

Improve rankings for transactional keywords (e.g., eviction attorney, unlawful detainer lawyer, etc.)

Coordinate content creation aligned with search demand



Local & Authority SEO



Optimize and manage Google Business Profile

Build and clean local citations

Develop authority signals and high-quality backlinks

Monitor competitors and identify gaps

AI / Generative Search Optimization

Structure content to appear in AI-generated answers

Implement schema and entity-based optimization

Increase likelihood of being cited by AI systems

Track visibility across emerging search platforms



Technical & Analytical



Identify indexing, crawl, and site issues

Monitor rankings, traffic, and conversions

Provide clear reports focused on business impact



Required Experience



Proven success with SEO for U.S. service businesses (legal preferred)

Demonstrated ability to generate leads — not just rankings

Strong understanding of local SEO

Ability to communicate clearly in U.S. English

Experience with WordPress

High reliability and attention to detail



Strongly Preferred

Conversion optimization experience

Competitive pay based on experience

title: Credit Repair Disputer
description:
We are a rapidly growing credit repair company with an expanding client base, and we are looking for a skilled full-time, in-house Credit Repair Disputer to join our team. This is NOT an outsourced or freelance role. In this position, you will be responsible for analyzing client credit reports in detail, identifying all personal information including addresses, and determining which items may be inaccurate, outdated, or negatively impacting the client’s profile. You will be expected to create effective dispute plans tailored to each client, strategically targeting accounts, collections, and personal information such as incorrect addresses, and then carry out the dispute process with the major credit bureaus (Experian, Equifax, and TransUnion). The ideal candidate must have strong experience in credit repair, a deep understanding of dispute strategies, and the ability to work independently while managing multiple files. Attention to detail, organization, and strong English communication skills are essential to ensure accuracy and proper documentation. This is a full-time position paying $160 per week, with opportunities for growth and performance-based bonuses. Please send your resume for consideration.



PLEASE SEND US YOUR RESUME. DO NOT CRAFT A CHAT GPT WRITTEN RESUME. WORK HOURS ARE 12PM TO 9PM PACIFIC TIME

title: Remote Sales Manager
description:
Remote Sales Manager



Position Title: Inside Sales Manager

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Schedule: Monday to Friday, 9:00 a.m.–6:00 p.m. (US Eastern Time)

Pay: depending on your experience and qualifications.



About the Role

We are seeking a high-energy, growth-driven Inside Sales Manager to lead and scale our outbound and inbound sales teams in the Philippines. This role is pivotal to our 10X growth strategy and will be responsible for recruiting, training, scripting, and continuously developing a high-performing remote and onsite sales force.



Key Responsibilities

• Build and manage two distinct departments: Outbound and Inbound Sales.

• Recruit, onboard, and train remote and onsite sales reps.

• Develop and refine sales scripts, objection handling, and closing techniques.

• Implement ongoing training programs and performance coaching.

• Set, track, and achieve clear performance metrics (KPIs) for teams and individuals, create dashboards/reports and drive data-backed improvements.

• Monitor pipeline health, conversion rates, AHT, contact rates, and revenue per rep.

• Collaborate with leadership to align sales strategy with company growth goals.

• Foster a culture of accountability, energy, and excellence.



Qualifications

• 5–10 years of experience in inside sales leadership, preferably in BPO or high-volume environments.

• Proven track record of scaling teams and delivering revenue growth.

• Strong understanding of remote team dynamics and call center operations.

• Excellent communication, coaching, and analytical skills.

• Experience with CRM systems (preferably Infor CRM/Saleslogix) and sales-enablement tools.

• Hands-on experience creating KPI frameworks, setting targets, and managing to those metrics.



Preferred Traits

• Energetic and motivational leadership style.

• Strategic thinker with a hands-on approach.

• Familiarity with the Philippine market and workforce culture.

title: Remote Administrative Assistant
description:
Job Title: Remote Administrative Assistant



Job Summary

We are seeking a proactive, organized, and dependable Administrative Assistant to support our executives or supervisors in a remote work environment. The ideal candidate will excel in managing meetings, sending invites, updating schedules, taking detailed notes, and following up on action items until they are completed. This role requires strong communication, time management, and multitasking abilities, along with a high level of professionalism and discretion.

mbers to ensure tasks are completed

s on behalf of executives or supervisors, or assist with drafting, reviewing, and managing
 correspondence as directed

Schedule & Availability

title: Virtual Assistant - Community & Operations Support
description:
This is a Virtual Assistant Role with focus on Community & Operations support.



Sponge is an untypical branding agency based in Brisbane Australia and proudly working to build the Business for Good community. We believe that awesome is no longer enough; businesses must also do good to achieve the success they truly want.



We work exclusively with purpose-led and purpose-ready business owners to help them become ElectroMagnets for top talent and dream clients. Our goal is to help 1 million people live their lives to the fullest by helping create cultures where people shine, building impact models that inspire greatness, and crafting brand stories that ripple meaning through the market.



We are fanatical about culture and this role must be a culture fit. Check out what that means for us at our website (which you will have to find). We highly recommend you read our culture pages.



If you're obsessed with order, thrive on structure, and love making things run smoothly, this might be your dream role.



THE ROLE: WHY WE NEED YOU



We are looking for a highly meticulous Community & Operations Assistant to manage the heartbeat of our outreach and events.



Note: This role will begin strictly as part-time (up to 20 hours/week), but has the potential to evolve into a Full-Time position based on the relationship built and the value you provide.



This is not a creative marketing or project management role. This is a pure execution role. You will be running established Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) to ensure our community members are invited, engaged, and nurtured consistently. If you are a stickler for detail, love following a proven process, and take pride in making sure no one falls through the cracks, this is for you.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



COMMUNITY RELATIONSHIP MANAGEMENT & OUTREACH

- Execute daily LinkedIn outreach and messaging on behalf of the founder using proven SOPs and scripts

- Manage follow-ups based on established outreach cadences to ensure the right frequency of touch

- Track engagement and maintain accurate records of conversations and interactions



CLIENT COMMUNICATION

- Draft and send weekly client project updates

- Keep CRM data current and accurate

- Support professional, friendly communication with clients on behalf of the founder



EVENT COORDINATION & OPERATIONS

- Set up and update regular events across multiple online platforms

- Coordinate with our design team to ensure event graphics are published correctly

- Invite curated "A-list" guests to events following specific guidelines

- Track RSVPs, monitor attendance, and ensure the correct follow-up messages are sent



 COMMUNICATION & CAMPAIGN SUPPORT

- Assist with ongoing
 communications and campaign execution via Mailchimp

- Manage segmented lists and execute scheduled communications

- Support specific follow-ups based on community engagement or event attendance



DATA, REPORTING & ADMINISTRATION

- Keep our CRM and community contact lists meticulously clean and updated

- Send daily "End of Day" (EOD) reports detailing completed tasks, blockers, and next steps

- Run established Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) reliably to ensure no one falls through the cracks



REQUIREMENTS



- Extreme Attention to Detail: Small mistakes compound quickly in community operations. You must be highly accurate.

- Process Discipline: You must be comfortable and happy executing repetitive, structured SOPs daily without needing to "reinvent" them.

- Tech Comfort: Experience with LinkedIn (outreach/messaging), Mailchimp, CRM management, and event platforms.

- Relationship Awareness: A professional, warm tone and an understanding of how to treat high-value community members.

- Availability: Up to 20 hours/week, spread across the week and aligning with the founder’s time.

- Hunger: A hunger to learn better ways to do things. You always want to optimise, simplify, and improve.



BONUS SKILLS (Not Required, but Great to Have)

As this role has the potential to grow into a full-time position, candidates with the following additional skills will be highly regarded:

- Experience with social media posting and platform management

- Account management experience

- Light account management and client relationship building



TO APPLY



Your application must include:

1. Write a short intro about why you're applying for this role and why it fits you.

2. Share a specific example of how you’ve managed events via event platforms.

3. Share an example of how you organised chaos into clarity, i.e. a system, checklist, routine, or tool that made something easier and more efficient.

4. Confirm your availability for 20 hours/week and your ability to work with a start time of around 9:30am AEST most week days.

5. Use the word "Connection" in your subject line and your 4th sentence.

6. Tell us what our culture means to you.

7. Use exactly 7 app points.



We’ll only consider applicants who follow all instructions.



This position is long-term, stable, and highly valued. If you love structure, take pride in being the one who keeps the community humming, and want to work with a business that’s doing good in the world, we look forward to hearing from you.
