title: Project Manager
description:
Type of Work: Full-Time

Compensation: $600/month USD

Hours: 40 hours/week

Location: Remote



Faith-forward. Purpose-driven. Team Atmosphere.



About Ruah Creative House



Ruah Creative House is a faith-forward creative studio helping churches, Christian nonprofits, and values-aligned leaders communicate with clarity and excellence. We produce reels, sermon cuts, event promos, podcast clips, and social-first video content designed for real impact, not vanity metrics.



We are a small, fast-moving team and we are growing. That growth is exactly why this role exists.



What we're about:

- Purpose over hype: helpful, truthful, on-mission work.

- Systems that serve: we build things that work and train people to run them.

- Teamwork: clear briefs, quick feedback, zero drama. We grow people, not just projects.



Who we serve:

- Multi-site churches and ministries

- Faith-based coaches and communicators

- Community nonprofits and Kingdom-minded entrepreneurs



Why This Role Exists



Right now our owner is functioning as the creative director, account lead, editor supervisor, and project manager simultaneously. We need someone who owns the operational middle, the layer between client communication, editor execution, and delivery, so the creative work can stay creative.



This person is not a task-taker. They are a system-keeper. They make sure nothing falls through the cracks, editors always have what they need before they start, clients know where things stand, and finished work actually gets delivered.



Why Join Our Team

- Consistent, faith-aligned work

- A team that invests in your growth and gives you the tools to succeed

- Clear expectations and direct leadership

- Paid PH holidays + birthday off

- Real ownership of a critical function, not just task execution

- Room to grow as the agency scales



Role at a Glance



Title: Project Manager

Compensation: $650/month USD, paid bi-weekly via Wise

Hours: 40 hours/week, fully remote

Probation: Paid 2-week onboarding at part-time hours. Transition to full-time upon successful completion.

Schedule: Flexible working hours with overlap required during US Eastern business hours. One weekly tea
eting at 9 AM PHT.



Your Typical Week



Production Pipeline:

- Keep Motion (Our PM software) updated with accurate project statuses, deadlines, and task assignments

- Make sure editors have complete project briefs and all assets before a project starts

- Manage revision rounds using a single consolidated note set rule

- Track deliverables across client relationships simultaneously

- Own distribution checklists so finished videos actually get published and delivered



Client and Asset Coordination:

- Run weekly client check-ins and status updates

- Build and maintain asset intake folders with clear client instruction sheets

- Chase missing footage, approvals, and sign-offs so projects don't stall

- Onboard new projects cleanly with briefs, timelines, and kickoff coordination



Team Communication:

- Serve as the communication hub between the owner, editors, and clients

- Translate creative direction into clear written briefs before work starts

- Flag risks early and propose solutions before they become delays



Operations Support:

- Manage client records and invoicing coordination in Dubsado

- Document processes as you learn them so the team can move faster

- Support event capture logistics as that service line grows



What Great Looks Like

- Nothing falls through the cracks on your watch

- Editors never start a project without everything they need

- The owner is not chasing status updates or sourcing assets

- Clients know where their project stands without having to ask

- You can be trusted to carry projects through to the finish line



Requirements

- Genuine faith background and personal alignment with a Kingdom-first mission

- At least 1 year of experience in project management, operations, or a senior VA role

- Strong written English

- Experience with project management tools: Motion, Asana, Monday, Clickup, or similar

- Comfortable with Google Drive, Google Chat, and collaborative workflows

- Reliable internet connection, 50 Mbps down / 20 Mbps up, with backup hotspot

- Available for overlap with US Eastern business hours

- Highly organized, proactive, and comfortable managing multiple moving pieces



Nice to Have

- Experience with Dubsado or similar CRM tools

- Background working with creative agencies or video teams

- Familiarity with faith-based or church clients

- Experience building SOPs and documenting processes

- AI tools and prompting knowledge



Our Culture



We are a faith-first team. That means the work is grounded in something bigger than metrics. We serve churches, nonprofits, and Kingdom-minded leaders, and we take that seriously. Faith alignment isn't a checkbox here; it's the foundation the whole agency is built on.



This role sits at the center of everything we do. You will be coordinating with church clients, faith-based nonprofits, and a team that genuinely cares about the mission. We need someone who understands that world, not just professionally but personally.



How to Apply



 subject: Ruah Creative House PM, Your Name, Your Favorite Bible Verse



Please include:

- A short paragraph about your project management background and the types of teams or projects you have coordinated

- One specific example of a time you caught a problem before it became a delay

- Your availability and time zone, including overlap with US Eastern hours

- Confirmation of reliable internet and backup plan

- Your experience with any of these tools: Motion, Asana, Monday, Dubsado, Google Drive



Tip: Read the instructions carefully. How you apply tells us how you operate.



Process and Timeline

- We review applications as they come in

- Shortlist, brief screening conversation, offer

- Onboarding: Paid 2-week part-time training, then full-time



Ground Rules

- We can't move forward if you submit a generic application with no specific examples

- Miss meetings or deadlines without notice

- Need heavy oversight to manage your own task list



If you are organized, proactive, and want to be the operational backbone of a growing faith-forward creative agency, we would love to hear from you.

title: Social Media and Content Manager
description:
***At Polaris, we’re on the lookout for a driven, detail-oriented, and marketing-savvy Marketing and Acquisitions Assistant to join our world-class team. If you thrive in fast-paced environments, love the idea of being the operational backbone of a company’s marketing engine, and have strong hands-on experience with GoHighLevel, content creation, CRM systems, and social media, this role is for you.



***About us:

Polaris is a consulting agency with a bold mission: To help 1 million Founders to leverage time, reclaim freedom, and scale without sacrifice. We’re the only firm blending coaching and done-for-you services through a hybrid model — empowering our clients with strategic delegation, streamlined operations, and scalable systems. 



***Who we are looking for:

The ideal candidate is a detail-oriented, creative and dependable team player with experience working as a part of a high performing team and someone with a strong background in social media and content strategy.

You have a proven track record of planning, creating and executing engaging content in the online education and high-ticket service space (i.e. Coaches, agencies, advisors). Leading to increased visibility, higher engagement and creating content that convert followers into leads. 



In addition to consistent content output, it is expected that you’ll display a high level of proactiveness towards improving the management and sharing of content, maximizing the use of current tools or materials of the organization in a smart way and working closely with the Founder as a key part of the team. 



***Key Responsibilities

Content management:

- Create content that aligns with current trends and industry best practices, while managing content calendars to ensure posts go out consistently and on time.

- Collaborate with the leadership team to ensure content reflects key brand messages and marketing goals.

- Set up and manage tools like website domains, business
s, text messaging, and Google profiles, and keep marketing automations and workflows running smoothly.



Video editing:

- Apply video edits such as cuts/transitions, audio overlays, cinematic inserts and other edits that align with the brand and content goals.

- Create engaging short-form reels for platforms such as Instagram and TikTok

- Assist in editing long form videos for podcast interviews and youtube. 

- Create eye catching thumbnails

- Audience Management and prospecting:

- Send connection requests, monitor, respond to, send and engage with comments, messages, and mentions on social media platforms to build meaningful connections and foster a positive brand image.

- Ensure the contact database is regularly updated and accurately organized, while segmenting
 lists to enable targeted and effective communication



CRM Workflows

- Efficiently manage client relationships through customized CRM workflows

Tracking leads in real time, automating follow-ups, and syncing seamlessly with your favorite tools.

- Monitor KPIs in real time to refine strategies and ensure every campaign, workflow, and funnel delivers measurable ROI.



Tracking and reporting:

- Generate regular reports and provide analytics on content,
, and campaign performance.

- Monitoring and reporting on paid media performance by tracking metrics such as CPM, CPL, leads generated, and CPA.

- Overseeing and monitoring pipeline and opportunities, ensuring that leads are effectively tracked, followed up on, and moved through the stages



RESULTS (KPIs)

- 100% on time publication of content according to content calendar

- Minimize response time towards audience engagements and inquiries

- Increase overall social media engagement, audience growth and lead generation

- Consistent and accurate reporting of content and marketing performance metrics



SKILLS REQUIRED:

- Proficient in using video editing tools like Capcut, Descript, Davinci Resolve

- Ability to edit graphics using tools like Canva and Photoshop

- Proficient in using CRMs like Active Campaign, GoHighLevel and Clickfunnels

- Experience in Google Workspace (Gmail, GDrive, Docs, Sheets)

- Experience in Microsoft Office Workspace

- Understand the algorithm of different social media platforms

- Prior experience managing social media and content of personality-driven businesses



WORK SCHEDULE:

- Full time position. 8 hours per day. Monday to Friday.

- Exact shift times will be based on the job role.

- Depending on the demand, you may be required to work during any of these timezones: All North American time zones, European time zones, Australia/Asia Pacific time zones.



COMPENSATION STRUCTURE AND PERKS:

- Hourly rate starting from 4 USD / hour

- Eligibility for quarterly bonuses upon hitting performance KPIs. Up to 800USD

- Pay rise potential according to experience and performance

- Opportunity to be hired for projects at higher one-off fees on top of standard salary

title: Business Development & Customer Success Associate
description:
As a Business Development & Customer Success Associate, you’ll serve as the voice of a growing floral and gifting brand to both potential and existing clients. Your primary focus will be outbound calling to businesses to generate leads, build relationships, and uncover new opportunities. You’ll also play an important role in refining messaging, supporting customer service, and coordinating with internal operations teams to ensure a smooth client experience.



Key Responsibilities:

Lead Generation & Relationship Building

-Conduct outbound calls to businesses to introduce the company’s offerings and generate qualified leads particularly to other businesses.

-Build rapport with potential clients, understand their needs, and identify opportunities for collaboration.

-Document key insights from calls, including contact details, interest level, and next steps.





Sales Intelligence & Process Mapping

-When a lead doesn’t convert, dig deeper to understand the prospect’s buying process, decision-makers, and timing.

-Share findings with the team to improve targeting and messaging strategies.





Team Communication & Messaging Optimization

-Write clear, concise call notes and summaries to share with the team.

-Provide feedback on what messaging resonates and suggest improvements.

-Be available for ad hoc calls or huddles to pivot strategy based on real-time insights.





Customer Service & Operational Support

-Respond to customer inquiries via
 with professionalism and empathy.

-Coordinate with the florist and warehouse teams to ensure timely fulfillment of customer requests or issue resolution.





What We’re Looking For:

-Experience with B2B (business-to-business)

-Excellent verbal communication and active listening skills.

-Comfortable making cold calls and navigating gatekeepers.

-Strong writing skills for internal documentation and customer communication.

-Proactive, curious, and adaptable — you’re not afraid to ask questions or change course.

-Team player who thrives in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.

-Bonus: Experience with ShipStation, Shopify, Etsy or customer support platforms. / Experience in the floral business

title: Brand Manager – Mercado Libre
description:
Pet N Pet | Global Marketplace Expansion



Pet N Pet is expanding globally, and Mercado Libre is our next major growth channel—marking the first step in our broader international expansion strategy.



This is not a maintenance role. This is a launch mission with a strong focus on driving sales, gaining market share, and achieving early profitability.



Pet N Pet is a pet waste management and supplies brand committed to creating smarter, more responsible products for modern pet owners. Our product range includes solutions for dogs, cats, litter, and other pet categories.



We are looking for a Mercado Libre Brand Manager to lead our expansion across Latin America.



Reporting Structure

- Reports directly to the CEO and Online Sales Team Lead



Role Overview:

You will own the launch, growth, and strategic direction of Pet N Pet on Mercado Libre Mexico and Brazil. While brand building and positioning are important, this role is performance-driven, with a clear goal of:



- Fast launch execution

- Early sales traction

- Achieving top 3 category ranking as quickly as possible



You will lead marketplace execution while collaborating cross-functionally with:

- Marketing Department (graphics & video production)

- General VA Team (backend operations & execution)

- Inventory Planning Team (supplier coordination & stock alignment)



Key Responsibilities:



Marketplace Launch & Growth

- Lead and execute the marketplace launch strategy for Mexico and Brazil

- Drive fast-track growth with a strong focus on sales and profitability

- Establish category positioning and competitive advantage



Performance Marketing & Optimization

- Plan, execute, and optimize Mercado Libre Ads campaigns

- Continuously improve listings for visibility, ranking, and conversion

- Monitor KPIs and optimize performance based on data



Brand & Listing Management

- Oversee listing quality, content, and brand consistency across all products

- Identify opportunities to strengthen brand presence within the marketplace

- Ensure high-performing product pages and customer experience



Cross-Team Leadership

- Direct creative requirements to the Marketing Team

- Delegate and manage operational tasks through the VA Team

- Work closely with Inventory Planning to align stock with demand



Market Intelligence & Growth Strategy

- Conduct competitor analysis and category research

- Identify product gaps and support product development initiatives

- Recommend strategies to expand product lines and increase market share



Reporting & Insights

- Deliver structured weekly reports on performance, insights, and growth plans

- Translate data into actionable strategies for continuous improvement



Qualifications:

- Minimum 2+ years experience managing Mercado Libre accounts

- Proven experience with Mercado Libre Ads

- Experience launching or scaling brands on marketplaces

- Strong analytical, strategic, and problem-solving skills

- Experience in market research and competitor analysis



Who This Role is For:

This role is perfect for someone who wants to;  Build and own a new market from the ground up, drive aggressive growth and achieve real sales impact, combine strategy with hands-on execution and be part of a fast-moving, global expansion team

title: Senior Graphic Designer with Modern Skill with AI Prompting Master Skils and proven experience with Amazon
description:
Since 2013, Prodigy Media has built more than brands — we've created an Amazon-native empire. With 12 years of proven success and 28+ product lines under our belt, we don't play small. Our mission? Launch culturally resonant, design-led, emotionally sticky products that dominate Amazon and beyond.



Now, we're leveling up — and we want a design assassin who’s mastered AI workflows, commands Midjourney like a wizard, and turns prompts into visual gold.



WHO WE WANT



This is not your average graphic design role. We're looking for a hybrid Creative Director / Prompt Engineer / Graphic Design savant who can:



Think like a marketer. Design like an artist. Prompt like an AI god.



You’ll own the visual storytelling for our brands, using both traditional tools and bleeding-edge AI systems to pump out Amazon-optimized assets that convert.



WHAT YOU’LL DO



Craft Ultra-High-Converting Amazon Ads – static, lifestyle, 
-tier, and scroll-stopping. Own A+ Content Design – full module execution with story arcs that build obsession. Design Labels & Packaging – pixel-perfect, regulatory-ready, and unforgettable on the shelf. Prompt, Edit & Produce AI-Generated Visuals – using tools like Midjourney, DALL•E, Runway, Spline, Veo3, Sora, and others. Run 3D Product Renders – via Blender, KeyShot, or AI-powered 3D tools. Develop Scroll-Hook Videos – using After Effects, Premiere, Runway AI, etc.



Systematize Brand Visuals Across 30+ Products – while keeping it all aligned, emotional, and conversion-focused.



WHO YOU ARE



5+ years in design, at least 2+ years in Amazon/e-commerce brand creative

Fluent in Adobe Creative Suite, Figma, Blender, After Effects

Pro-level Midjourney / AI prompt engineer – this is non-negotiable

Obsessed with Amazon visual psychology, packaging psychology, and design that sells

Able to juggle 10 brands and still hit deadlines

Operate with a Creative Director mindset — not just execution, but strategy

Bonus: Experience creating creative systems, art direction templates, or leading a team



MUST-HAVES

Portfolio with Amazon ads, A+ pages, labels, 3D renders, videos, and AI-gen examples

Real-world use of AI tools integrated into your workflow

Available Mon-Fri 7:00am–3:30pm PST

title: SEO Manager Technical & On-Page for a US Company (Remote and Graveyard)
description:
A) SEO Leadership & Site Optimization (90% of role)

Own SEO strategy execution across the site: on-page SEO, technical SEO, and site health.

Troubleshoot ranking issues and implement fixes independently (e.g., keyword cannibalization, indexing issues, Google algorithm updates).

Monitor tools like SEMrush, Google Search Console, GA4 for performance, coverage, and errors; implement solutions quickly.

Maintain on-page SEO: update titles/meta, add internal links, refresh stale content, implement FAQ/schema updates.

Optimize site performance: compress/resize images, lazy-load media, minimize render-blocking assets, and improve Core Web Vitals.

Work with AI tools and automation workflows to enhance SEO and content operations.



B) CRM & Workflow Management (Supportive)

Use CRMs (preferably Go High Level, also familiar with Pipedrive, Salesforce, Zoho) to manage campaigns, leads, and workflows.

Build and maintain automations/workflows for marketing operations.

Collaborate with tea
mbers to align CRM data with SEO and site performance initiatives.



C) Elementor & WordPress Site Management (5–10% of role)

Convert legacy WordPress pages (Classic Editor/HTML) into Elementor using brand-consistent templates and global styles.

Implement technical hygiene during migration: 301 redirects, canonical tags, sitemaps, no-index where appropriate, fix orphan pages.

Stage/publish new pages or updates; QA for design, SEO, accessibility, and SOP compliance.

Basic troubleshooting of front-end issues with HTML/CSS and Elementor.



D) Collaboration, Compliance, & Standards

Follow SOPs, checklists, and QA processes meticulously; suggest improvements proactively.

Maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive content with care, particularly in healthcare/behavioral health contexts.

Communicate clearly with tea
mbers and represent the brand professionally.

Work independently, manage priorities, and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.



Required Skills & Experience

4+ years of hands-on SEO experience, particularly with WordPress sites.

Elementor Pro page-building experience.

Strong on-page and technical SEO fundamentals: site architecture, redirects, canonicals, sitemaps, robots.txt, schema basics.

Experience with SEMrush, Google Search Console, GA4, and page speed/Core Web Vitals optimization.

Knowledge of Yoast or Rank Math, media optimization, and basic accessibility standards.

Basic HTML/CSS skills for troubleshooting WordPress/Elementor issues.

Organized, detail-driven, and able to follow SOPs, checklists, and QA processes.

Clear written communication for documentation and updates.



Nice to Have

Building reusable Elementor templates.

Experience with managed WordPress hosting (WP Engine, 
) and CDNs like Cloudflare.

Familiarity with performance optimization tools (WP Rocket, NitroPack, Screaming Frog, PageSpeed Insights, Looker Studio dashboards).

Experience with healthcare or behavioral health content.



Compensation & Schedule

Rate: $9 USD per hour.



Working hours:

4 hours overlap in CST (core collaboration hours).

4 hours fixed Philippine time (must remain consistent each day).

Paid time off: Includes standard US holidays and paid leaves.

Fully remote; virtual collaboration via RingCentral (camera optional except for standups/meetings).

title: Website & Growth Manager (Shopify & Wix)
description:
Pet N Pet is looking for a hands-on Website & Growth Manager to take full ownership of our website performance—from technical execution and design to conversion optimization,
 marketing, AI integration, and data-driven growth strategy.



This role is ideal for someone who blends web development expertise with e-commerce growth thinking, and knows how to turn traffic into real revenue while aligning marketing, content, and social media efforts.



About the Role:

You will manage and continuously improve our Shopify and Wix websites, ensuring seamless functionality while optimizing the customer journey to drive conversions and sales.



Beyond execution, you’ll play a key role in analyzing data, identifying opportunities, and translating insights into actionable strategies that guide our marketing, content, and social media teams. This position bridges technical execution and strategic growth, helping ensure all efforts contribute directly to revenue.



Key Responsibilities:

- Website Management & Technical Oversight

- Manage and maintain Shopify and Wix websites

- Execute website updates, redesigns, and layout improvements

- Optimize site speed, performance, and mobile responsiveness

- Handle technical fixes and maintenance (HTML, CSS, JavaScript)



Conversion & Marketing Optimization:

- Build and optimize product pages, landing pages, and checkout flows

- Increase conversion rates through UX/UI improvements and testing

- Set up and manage
 marketing flows (welcome, abandoned cart, post-purchase, win-back)

- Implement customer segmentation and automation strategies

- Optimize trust elements (reviews, badges, FAQs, policies)

- Integrate and manage analytics, tracking, and conversion tools

- Apply AI-driven personalization to improve user experience and sales



Data-Driven Strategy & Cross-Team Collaboration:

- Monitor website, sales, and marketing performance metrics

- Translate data into clear, actionable strategies

- Communicate insights to content, social media, and sales teams

- Align campaigns and initiatives with revenue goals

- Develop execution plans and ensure cross-team accountability



AI Integration & Innovation

- Explore and implement AI tools for personalization, automation, and support

- Improve marketing performance through AI-driven insights and workflows

- Identify opportunities to increase efficiency and conversion using AI



Social Media & Marketing Support:

- Provide data-backed insights to improve social media performance

- Collaborate with marketing teams to ensure traffic converts into sales

- Test, analyze, and optimize campaigns across channels



To apply, please submit your resume and a short cover letter, and answer the following:

1. What experience do you have managing and optimizing Shopify and Wix websites?

        -Include specific results (conversion rate, revenue growth, performance improvements)

2. How do you use data and analytics to turn insights into actionable strategies for marketing, content, and social media teams?

3. Describe a specific example where you helped turn website or campaign traffic into sales.

    - What actions did you take and what were the results?

4. What AI tools or automations have you used for websites, marketing, or customer support?

    - How would you apply them to improve Pet N Pet’s conversion performance?

5. How do you collaborate with content, social media, and sales teams to ensure alignment on data, goals, and execution?

title: EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT – Phone Communications & Soft Sales [REMOTE]
description:
**ABOUT THE ROLE**

We’re a close, family-like U.S. long-term rental company looking for a sharp, resourceful, people-savvy Executive Assistant to support day-to-day operations. We’re hiring someone with proven, long-term professional experience — in any field. This is NOT an entry-level position.



We’ll train you on the “what” with leasing — but we need you to bring the “how” with real objection-handling and soft sales intuition. That means:

**Thinking fast under pressure and during live calls

**Guiding conversations naturally and persuasively

**Solving problems before they escalate

**Speaking English clearly and confidently on the phone

**Caring about the business like it’s your own



We value people who treat the business like they’re part of it — not just clocking hours. If you’re the kind of person who goes the extra mile because you take pride in doing great work, you’ll thrive here.



**WHAT YOU’LL ACTUALLY DO**

• Be a reliable, professional point of contact for current tenants

• Manage lease renewals and ongoing tenant communication

• Make phone calls to gather info, follow up, and resolve issues

• Coordinate tasks, track details, and prevent things from falling through the cracks

• Help solve problems independently — and escalate only when needed

• Keep the owner organized and focused



-> This is not a checklist-following job. It’s a *thinking* role for someone who can move fast, stay calm, and figure things out ...many times while still on the phone.



**WHO THIS ROLE IS PERFECT FOR**

• *You speak clearly, confidently, and professionally in English — especially on calls*

• You’re a natural problem solver who can handle unexpected challenges without panic

• You think fast, take initiative, and don’t need hand-holding

• You genuinely care about the quality of your work and the business you’re supporting

• You’re someone who prepares, researches, and shows up ready

• You value long-term stability and being part of a trusted team



-> No property management or sales experience required

-> *Training provided — but success in this role depends on your ability to communicate smoothly and handle objections in live conversations with clarity and confidence*



**WORK SCHEDULE**

This is Remote (Work from Home – must have reliable computer & internet)

• Full-time (40 hours/week) | Independent Contractor

• You choose your exact working hours, but must be reachable and responsive during U.S. Pacific Time business hours (7 AM – 7 PM, Mon–Fri), with active work occurring within that window



**COMPENSATION & GROWTH**

*Base pay up to $800/month to start,* with performance-based increases and bonuses for reliability, initiative, and strong work ethic.

Long-term role with real stability — no short-term rentals, no Airbnb chaos

Direct collaboration with the business owner — your work will actually make a difference



**FROM A CURRENT TEA
MBER**

“Working with Heavenly Happy Homes over the past year has been an experience I am truly blessed and grateful for. It has indeed been life-changing. From the very beginning, I felt trusted, supported, and encouraged to do my best. That kind of environment makes a huge difference, especially when working remotely. After going through uncertainty in a previous role, I was really praying to find a company where I could grow, learn, and feel secure long-term. Heavenly Happy Homes turned out to be exactly that and more. You genuinely find yourself loving the company and sincerely caring about the work you do. The culture here is respectful and collaborative, and everyone truly wants to see each other succeed. Even as a remote team, there is a strong sense of teamwork and shared purpose, which I honestly love. Training is efficient and well guided. R.S. helped me a lot, especially in understanding processes clearly. Another thing I can sincerely say is that hard work here never goes unnoticed. It is always valued and genuinely appreciated. Our boss is truly a wonderful employer!”



**HOW TO APPLY**

Submit your application here: 

Applications through OLJ may not be considered. Please complete the application at the link in this post.

This position will work closely with the leadership team to strengthen internal processes, improve operational efficiency, and ensure consistent service delivery as the company scales.

The Process & Strategy Manager will lead the development and optimization of operational systems across Customer Success, HR, Billing, Sales Support, and Onboarding.

etings.

title: VMIX GT Specialist // Animation & Data
description:
Job Title: Broadcast Graphics Specialist

Location: Remote

Employment Type: Full-Time or Contract

Company: REKT Productions

Compensation: PHP35,000 - PHP55,000 - Output outside of this range will be considered on a case by case basis



About REKT Productions



REKT Productions is a Melbourne-based production company specializing in esports broadcasts, corporate livestreams, podcasts, and premium digital content. We work with global brands, game publishers, and businesses to create high-quality productions and storytelling.



As we expand our creative services, we looking for a detail-oriented Broadcast Graphics Specialist to support our live productions by building and managing graphics packages within vMix using GT Title Designer.



This role is focused on implementing pre-designed assets (PSD files) into functional, animated broadcast graphics and ensuring accurate real-time data integration.



Key Responsibilities

- Import and structure layered PSD files into GT Title Designer (vMix)

- Build and animate broadcast graphics using GT Designer tools

- Set up and manage data-driven graphics using Google Sheets

- Connect graphics to external data sources/APIs via Google Sheets

- Ensure all graphics function correctly in a live broadcast environment

- Maintain consistency, accuracy, and reliability across all assets



Requirements

- Experience with vMix and GT Title Designer (or similar broadcast graphics tools)

- Strong experience converting PSD/Graphics Packages into Broadcast Ready Assets

- Basic animation skills (in/out transitions)

- Experience working with Google Sheets as a data source

- High attention to detail and ability to follow structured workflows

- Ability to troubleshoot quickly in time-sensitive situations



Nice to Have

- Experience in esports or live event broadcasting

- Familiarity with APIs or automated data feeds

- Experience in building data sourcing sheets

- Understanding of live production workflows



How to apply

Please submit the following:

Your availability and expected salary range

Your CV/Resume

Any portfolio you have, or projects you have worked on previously.

title: Medical Virtual Assitant
description:
Remote | Full-Time | Australian Business Hours



The Lucy Rose Clinic is an established Australian integrative telehealth clinic specialising in women’s hormonal, metabolic, and thyroid health. We support patients nationwide through practitioner consultations and advanced laboratory testing.



We are seeking a confident and compassionate Patient Support & Sales Specialist to support patients after their appointments and guide them through the next steps in their health journey.



This role combines patient support, health education, and consultative sales.



You will speak with patients who have already engaged with the clinic and help ensure they receive the right programs, testing, and support to achieve their health goals.



This role is primarily phone-based, so excellent spoken English and confidence speaking with patients is essential.



This is not cold calling. You will work with warm patients who have already had appointments or expressed interest in our programs.



About the Role



Responsibilities include:



• Outbound follow-up calls to patients after practitioner appointments

• Ensuring patients understand their testing, treatment plans, and next steps

• Supporting patients to stay engaged with their health programs

• Recommending appropriate programs, products, and memberships where relevant

• Up selling extended care packages when appropriate

• Handling inbound patient enquiries and guiding them to the right services

• Providing booking links for consultations or coaching sessions

• Answering general questions and escalating clinical queries when needed

• Documenting patient interactions in our CRM systems



You will work closely with our Australian clinical and operations team to ensure patients receive excellent support throughout their journey.



What We’re Looking For



• Qualification in Nursing, Nutrition, Health Sciences, or Allied Health preferred

• Experience in healthcare administration, telehealth, or patient support

• Experience in sales, upselling, or consultative selling

• Near-native spoken English with a clear, neutral accent easily understood by Australian patients

• Confident and warm phone manner

• Comfortable working with scripts, KPIs, and conversion targets

• Highly organised with strong attention to detail

• Reliable internet connection and quiet working environment



Highly Regarded



• Experience working with Australian or US healthcare accounts

• Experience in telehealth or healthcare call centres

• Experience selling health programs, supplements, or wellness services

• Familiarity with CRMs and scheduling systems



What We Offer



• Full training in our programs and clinical approach

• Structured scripts and sales support

• Stable, long-term role with a growing Australian clinic

• Performance bonuses based on conversions and KPIs

• Supportive and professional team environment



How to Apply



Please include:



• Your CV

• A 1–2 minute introduction video explaining your background and experience speaking with patients by phone

• Your healthcare or wellness background

• Your experience speaking with clients or patients on calls



In your video, please answer this question:



How would you support a patient who is unsure about completing their testing or continuing their program?



Applications without a video will not be considered.

title: SEO Content Writer (Freelance / Contract)
description:
We’re looking for a skilled SEO Content Writer to produce high-quality, search-optimised content that builds authority, drives organic traffic, and supports commercial growth.

This is a freelance/contract position paid per article, ideal for a writer who understands SEO fundamentals, EEAT principles, and can translate complex topics into clear, engaging content tailored to defined audiences.

You will work to structured briefs aligned with our monthly content themes and business priorities.

 

 

Compensation Structure

1. Payment is per approved article.

2. Rate will vary depending on:

 a. Word count (e.g. 1,000–2,500+ words)

 b. Research depth required

 c. Complexity of topic

 d. Inclusion of supporting research or expert references

3. Clear scope and word count expectations will be provided upfront.

4. Payment made upon approval of final submitted draft.



Articles will need to align to the following structure:

Write long-form, SEO-optimised articles aligned with provided briefs.

Ensure content is:

Easily consumable and well-structured.

Written for a defined audience persona.

Clear when explaining complex or technical topics.

Grammatically strong and aligned with brand tone.

Incorporate primary and secondary keywords naturally.

Structure content to meet Google’s EEAT principles.

Write across various SEO-focused formats, including:

In-depth guides

Listicles

“What is” explainers

“How to” articles

Comparison pieces

Industry insight articles

 

Deliver 100% original content.

Ensure content is not AI-generated.

Fact-check claims and cite credible sources.

Align content with any relevant regulatory or industry requirements.

Provide short-form social media copy to promote each published article.

title: Digital marketing specialist
description:
We’re looking for a driven and detail-oriented Digital Marketing Specialist with 1–3 years’ experience to support and scale our performance marketing

 

You’ll work closely with the Growth Marketing Manager to optimise campaigns, improve acquisition performance, and contribute to the expansion of our marketing mix. This role is ideal for someone early in their career who wants hands-on exposure across paid media, SEO, EDM, and reporting.

 

Paid Media & Campaign Optimisation

Manage and optimise paid campaigns across platforms (Google Ads, Meta, LinkedIn, etc.).

Monitor performance daily and implement structured optimisations.

A/B test ad copy, creative, targeting, and landing pages.

Improve CPA, ROAS, CTR, and conversion rates.

Identify underperforming campaigns and recommend strategic changes.

Write ad copy, that aligns to channel best practices to test and improve performance.

 

Budget & Performance Management

Manage campaign budgets in line with internal forecasting models.

Ensure campaigns remain aligned with monthly growth targets.

Escalate performance risks early.

 

Growth & Channel Development

Identify new channel opportunities and platform experiments.

Support testing roadmap execution.

Research emerging ad formats and acquisition strategies.

 

SEO & Website Support

Implement on-page SEO improvements (meta data, internal linking, headings).

Collaborate with content team on keyword alignment.

Support organic growth initiatives.



Reporting & Insights

Prepare daily/weekly/monthly performance reports as requested by the Growth Marketing Manager.

Extract insights from marketing and internal data.

Provide actionable recommendations for optimisation.

 

 

 

About You

You are proactive, enjoy a challenge, naturally curious and enjoy learning. If you often ask yourself; how can I make this better or how does that work, you’ll do well. 



Required Skills & Experience

1–3 years’ experience in digital marketing.

Hands-on experience with paid ads in general, is ideal however not channel specific.

Basic understanding of SEO principles.

Intermediate understanding of marketing terminology and strategies.

Strong Excel or Google Sheets skills.

Comfortable analysing performance metrics (CPA, ROAS, CVR).

Excellent written and verbal communication skills.



What We Offer

Hands-on exposure across the full marketing funnel.

Opportunity to grow into a mid-level performance role.

Flexible working environment.

Performance focused, with real ownership of results.

Opportunity to learn all disciplines of marketing.

title: Executive Assistant / Customer Support
description:

Bridge Driver helps individuals earn income by renting vehicles to work with gig apps like DoorDash, Instacart, Uber Eats, and more. We provide reliable cars on a weekly or long-term basis.



We are hiring a highly reliable and detail-oriented Executive Assistant to manage customer communication, follow up with leads, and handle payment-related tasks inside **GoHighLevel (GHL)**.



This role is **operations-focused** and requires someone who can follow systems, communicate clearly, and stay organized.

• Respond to all incoming messages (SMS, social media,
)

• Answer questions about pricing, availability, and process

• Follow up with leads who have not completed signup



---

---

---

---



# Requirements



? Strong **English communication (written + spoken)**

---



# Work Expectations



• Must be **responsive throughout shift**

• Long-term reliability is critical



---



# Compensation

---

 Start your application with the word **“DRIVE”** so we know you read everything.

title: Business Analyst (ERP & Data Analytics)
description:
We are seeking one or two experienced Business Analysts with strong SAP ERP and data analytics capability to support ERP-driven business insights and operational optimisation initiatives.



The role will bridge ERP data (SAP – Materials Management) with advanced analytical modelling to deliver structured, insight-driven reporting and recommendations.



This is not a purely reporting role — candidates must be capable of querying, transforming, modelling, and interpreting data to inform business decisions.



SAP ERP – Materials Management (MM)

 • Strong working knowledge of SAP ERP

 • Specific experience within Materials Management (MM) module

 • Understanding of:

 • Procurement lifecycle

 • Inventory management

 • Purchase orders

 • Goods receipt / goods issue

 • Vendor master data

 • Material master structures

 • Ability to extract and reconcile ERP transactional data



Advanced Data & Analytics Capability



Excel (Advanced Level Required)

 • Complex formulas

 • Pivot tables

 • Power Query (data transformation)

 • Data cleansing & reconciliation

 • Scenario modelling



Power BI

 • Data modelling

 • Relationship building

 • DAX measures

 • Dashboard creation

 • KPI visualisation

 • Interactive reporting



SQL (Mandatory)

 • Writing queries

 • Joins (inner, left, etc.)

 • Grouping & aggregations

 • Filtering large datasets

 • Data validation



Modelling & Insight Capability



Candidates must demonstrate ability to:

 • Interpret large data sets

 • Identify trends and anomalies

 • Translate ERP data into operational insights

 • Build structured analytical models

 • Present findings clearly (dashboard or executive summary format)

 • Support data-driven decision-making



This role requires analytical thinking, not just reporting extraction.



Ideal Candidate Profile

 • 3–7+ years’ experience as Business Analyst / Data Analyst

 • Experience working in ERP-heavy environments

 • Strong commercial awareness

 • Comfortable engaging with finance, supply chain, operations

 • High attention to detail

 • Structured, logical thinker

title: Amazon Online Sales Expert (AU & UK Markets | Remote)
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled Amazon Online Sales Expert who can take full ownership of our Amazon accounts and drive consistent sales growth.



This role is for someone who understands Amazon inside and out—from PPC and listings to inventory and profitability. You will be responsible for improving performance, increasing conversions, and ensuring the account runs smoothly.



Responsibilities:

Sales & Account Growth

- Drive overall sales growth and improve product performance

- Improve Best Seller Rank (BSR) across key products

- Maintain strong account health and performance



Inventory Management

- Monitor inventory levels and turnover

- Work with the Supply Chain team to prevent stockouts and overstocking



Listing Optimization

- Collaborate with the Creative team to improve Product Detail Pages and A+ Content

- Increase conversion rates through continuous optimization



Amazon PPC Management

- Manage and optimize Amazon Ads campaigns (AU & UK)

- Monitor performance metrics: CTR, CPC, CVR, ACOS, ROAS

- Adjust bids, budgets, and targeting to improve results

- Launch and scale new campaigns

- Maintain TACOS within target per product



Data & Strategy

- Analyze sales and traffic data regularly

- Conduct keyword research and competitor analysis

- Identify growth opportunities and implement strategies



Profitability & Reporting

- Manage and monitor P&L

- Ensure profitability targets are met



Team Collaboration

- Work closely with the Gen VA team for account support



Requirements

- Proven experience managing Amazon Seller Central accounts

title: Amazon Operations Executive
description:
Job Post — Amazon Operations Specialist

(Full-Time, Remote • Philippines)



Post this on OnlineJobs.ph. This is an execution role with real accountability — not a “checker.”



About the role

We run high-volume Amazon marketplaces and need a full-time operator to keep inventory in stock, shipments clean, and inbound discrepancies recovered. You will own the daily ops queue, work with our team, and keep everything tracked.



Schedule: Full-time (40 hrs/week).

Time zone: Overlap with Pacific Time is required.



What you will do (core responsibilities)



• Replenishment execution: Monitor Days of Cover on priority SKUs, create replenishment tickets, coordinate with warehouse/3PL, and track inbound through check-in.

• Inbound tracking: Maintain shipment tracker (working ? shipped ? delivered ? receiving ? checked-in).

• Receive discrepancy recovery: Reconcile shipped vs received by SKU, compile evidence packs, open cases, and follow up until reimbursed or resolved.

• Marketplace health queue: Address stranded inventory, search suppressed listings, pricing errors, coupon status, broken variations, image issues, and content gaps (titles/bullets).

• Case management: Write clean cases with evidence, track SLAs, escalate properly, and maintain a case log.

• Weekly reporting: Revenue-at-risk (stockouts/suppressions), what you fixed, what’s pending, blockers, and next actions.



KPIs (how you’ll be measured)



• Priority SKUs: No preventable stockouts (you escalate early).

• Inbound: 100% shipments tracked end-to-end with key dates.

• Claims: No missed claim windows; consistent follow-up until closure.

• Listing health: Suppressions/critical issues kept low and resolved quickly.

• Communication: Clear daily updates and weekly summaries; no surprises.



Requirements (do not apply if you don’t have these)



• 2+ years hands-on Seller Central experience (inventory, cases, listings).

• Strong understanding of FBA inbound workflows (shipments, receiving, discrepancies).

• Ability to build and maintain trackers (Google Sheets) with clean data discipline.

• Excellent written English for Amazon cases (clear, concise, evidence-driven).

• Reliable internet and ability to work independently without constant supervision.



Nice to have



• Experience with flat files, variation repairs, A+ content updates.

• Experience managing US and CA marketplaces.

• Experience with 3PL coordination and outbound shipment scheduling.



Application instructions (filter out weak applicants)



Reply with:

- A short summary of your Amazon operations experience (marketplaces, size of catalog).

- Your exact experience with FBA receive discrepancies (what evidence you use, how you follow up).

- A sample case message you would send to Amazon for missing units.

- Your internet speed and your available working hours overlapping with Pacific Time.

- Put the code word “CLEAN-OPS” in the first line so we know you read the post.



Compensation

Competitive for the Philippines market, based on experience. We reward operators who close loops and protect revenue.



If you’re the type who just “checks things,” don’t apply. If you can diagnose issues, run tickets, and close cases fast — apply.

Requirements:

1. Fluent written English with the ability to understand tone when responding to US based customer
s.

2. Expertise with Shopify backend to make changes to orders per customer request.

3. Ability to pay attention to detail, and be organized and track a customer service request up till the point it has been resolved.

4. Self starter who is able to jump on tasks without needing to be told to do so.

5. Open availability

6. Although not required, a plus would be deep knowledge of horticulture and home goods.

7. Another plus would be familiarity with Etsy to respond to customer service questions.



Key Responsibilities:



1. Checking customer service
s frequently and making sure all
s are being responded to within 24 hours.

2. Triaging incoming issues and allocating them to the warehouse or alternate team for ultimate resolution.

3. Tracking incoming requests till they are completed (whether they are being completed by you, or another team). Essentially owning the end to end resolution once a customer service ticket is generated.



To Apply:

1. Please submit some examples of customer service responses you have written.

2. Please send us a resume, let us know the hours you are available to work, and what your long term goals are, while submitting your application.



About Us:

Octavia Consulting Group is a US based entity with associates in both the US as well as the Philippines. We own and operate some eCommerce brands that we are in the process of scaling. We are looking for a talented associate who can help support our growth initiatives - we would love to hear from you.

title: Media Project Manager
description:
About Us



Mission First Media is a real estate media company specializing in high-quality listing content, including photography, video, and social media reels. We help agents present their listings professionally and stand out online.



We’re hiring a Media Project Manager to take ownership of our photo and video workflow—ensuring projects are organized, edited correctly, and delivered at a high standard.



Key Responsibilities:



• Organize and manage raw photo and video files and project folders

• Label and structure files according to scripts, shot lists, or project instructions

• Ensure files are clearly named and easy for editors to follow

• Prepare and send editing instructions to video and photo editors

• Review edited videos for quality control (QC)

• Review edited photos for quality control (QC)



Video QC includes:

• Correct clip order and structure

• Proper use of labeled footage

• Smooth pacing and flow

• Missing or incorrect clips

• Color/exposure consistency



Photo QC includes:

• Exposure and brightness consistency

• Color accuracy and white balance

• Straight lines and proper verticals

• Image clarity and sharpness

• Removal of distractions or editing errors



• Coordinate revisions with editors

• Track project timelines and ensure on-time delivery

• Deliver final media to clients



Requirements:



• Experience working with video editing, photo editing, or media production workflows

• Strong attention to detail (especially with file organization and QC)

• Ability to follow structured instructions and apply them accurately

• Highly organized with files, naming systems, and workflows

• Strong written English and communication skills



Preferred Experience:



• Real estate media or listing photo/video workflows

• Familiarity with tools like Google Drive, Dropbox, 

• Experience coordinating with remote editors



What Success Looks Like:



• Files are consistently organized, labeled, and editor-ready

• Editors clearly understand project structure without confusion

• Videos and photos pass QC with minimal revisions

• Projects are delivered on time and without errors



What We Offer:



• Remote position

• Long-term growth opportunity

• Structured systems and processes

• Opportunity to grow into a larger operations role



How to Apply:



Please submit the following items to: 
 (please put USA in the subject line)

• Resume

• Short introduction

• Describe your experience with media QC (video and/or photo) and file organization

title: Marketing Automation & Outreach Specialist (GHL / N8N / AI Tools)
description:
We are a growing marketing agency specializing in automated referral partner systems for established med spas. We are looking for a technically skilled, self-directed specialist who can independently build, manage, and optimize automations, AI workflows, and outreach systems.

If you live inside GoHighLevel, love building automations, and get excited about AI tools and workflow systems, this role was built for you. 

What You’ll Be Doing

Automation & Systems (Core Focus)

 ? Build, test, and optimize GoHighLevel workflows, pipelines, and automations

 ? Build and manage N8N workflows to connect and automate tools across the business

 ? Set up and refine AI agents and AI-powered automations

 ? Test existing systems end to end and identify and fix issues

 ? Package GHL builds into snapshots for client deployment

 ? Build and maintain outreach sequences and follow-up automations in GHL and Instantly

Outreach Support

 ? Manage and execute daily outreach via social media and

 ? Build and clean lead lists for med spa owners and referral partners

 ? Keep CRM pipelines organized and up to date in HighLevel and GroupTrack

 ? Move leads through pipeline stages correctly based on process and instructions

 ? Ensure follow-up tasks are created and nothing sits overdue

 ? Provide daily EOD reports summarizing outreach activity and pipeline updates

Tools & Campaign Support

 ? Manage
 outreach campaigns in Instantly or similar tools

 ? Support testing and quality checking of automated systems

 ? Document workflows, automations, and processes clearly as they are built

Required Experience. These Are Non-Negotiable:

 ? GoHighLevel — independently building workflows, automations, pipelines, and snapshots

 ? N8N — building workflow automations and system integrations

 ? AI tools and agents — building and managing AI-powered automations

 ? Outreach tools — Instantly, GroupTrack, or similar platforms

 ? CRM and pipeline management — keeping leads organized and moving

 ? Social media outreach — executing daily messaging sequences

 ? Google Sheets / Docs — list building, tracking, and reporting

 ? Strong written English — clear, professional communication

The Kind of Person I’m Looking For

 ? Technically strong and self-directed — you figure things out without constant guidance

 ? Detail-oriented — you follow instructions exactly and nothing slips through the cracks

 ? Proactive communicator — you update me without being asked

 ? Reliable and consistent — you show up every day and do what you say you will

 ? Process driven — you follow systems carefully and document what you build

 ? Ownership mentality — you treat this business like it matters because it does

Communication Expectations

Good communication is non-negotiable for me. If you are working on a given day I require:

 ? A check-in message when you start

 ? A message if you step away for an extended period

 ? A check-out message when you are done

 ? A brief daily EOD report summarizing tasks completed, messages sent, and any blockers

You must also commit to a fixed daily work block and communicate that block upfront. Consistency matters more than the specific hours.

Backup Connectivity Is Required

You must have a reliable backup internet connection or mobile data plan. Connectivity issues cannot be a recurring reason for missed work or communication.

Hiring Process

 ? Short Google Meet interview

 ? Small paid test project

 ? Short trial period for the selected candidate

How To Apply

Please send:

 1. A short introduction about yourself and your relevant experience

 2. Specific tools you have hands-on experience with — especially GHL, N8N, and AI automation tools

 3. Examples of automations, workflows, or GHL builds you have completed — screenshots or Loom walkthroughs preferred

 4. Your availability and EST time zone overlap

 5. Your fixed daily work block availability

Start your application with the word: 
ntum

Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.

This role starts at 10 hours per week with opportunity to grow for the right person. Pay starts at $7/hour and increases to $8/hour upon successful completion of the trial period.

title: Sales Manager – Student Enrollment Group
description:
Team Lead – Student Enrollment Group



U.S. Online Career School – Medical, IT & Project Management Programs



Are you an experienced enrollment/sales professional ready to guide and support a high-performing student enrollment support team? Do you have exceptional English communication skills and strong familiarity with U.S. culture?



Join a leading U.S.-based online career school that empowers students to build successful careers in Information Technology and Project Management. We are seeking a Team Lead for our Sales Assistant Group to provide daily oversight, maintain communication standards, and ensure a professional, compliant, and student-centered enrollment experience.



This is a hands-on leadership role within a structured, performance-focused remote environment serving U.S.-based students.



Key Responsibilities

Team Guidance & Oversight



• Provide daily direction and support to Sales Assistants

• Monitor activity levels, follow-ups, and enrollment progress

• Ensure adherence to enrollment processes and institutional standards

• Maintain high communication quality in all student interactions



Coaching & Quality Control



• Conduct call reviews and provide structured feedback

• Reinforce best practices in consultation, documentation, and professionalism

• Assist with onboarding and training new Sales Assistants

• Support team accountability and workflow consistency



Operational Support



• Coordinate with admissions, compliance, and academic teams

• Ensure enrollment documentation is accurate and complete

• Help identify process improvements to increase efficiency

• Step in during high-volume periods or escalated situations



Direct Enrollment Contribution



• Assist with consultations when needed

• Support lead management and follow-up consistency

• Maintain knowledge of IT and business certifications (e.g., CompTIA, PMP)



Requirements



• Proven experience in sales, admissions, or enrollment support

• Prior team lead or informal leadership experience preferred

• Strong English communication skills are required (both written and verbal)

• Ability to communicate clearly, confidently, and professionally with U.S.-based students

• Strong familiarity with U.S. culture and communication standards

• Demonstrated ability to meet structured enrollment targets

• Strong organizational and leadership skills

• Comfortable working in a remote team environment

• Familiarity with IT or business certifications is a strong plus

• Bachelor’s degree required

• Availability Monday to Friday, 10:00 AM – 6:30 PM EST



Compensation & Benefits



• Fixed Salary: $1,200 – $1,800 USD per month (based on experience)

• 100% remote work

• Professional growth opportunities within the U.S. education sector

• Structured leadership responsibilities

• Supportive and collaborative team culture

title: Accounts Payable Specialist
description:
ACCOUNTS PAYABLE SPECIALIST

Our company is the largest owner of Big O Tires franchises in Utah. Our fast-growing,

dynamic company has a fun culture and a great team of positive people to

work with.  Our people are our success!

At Big O Tires, we rely on a meticulous financial system to drive our business forward.

The accounts payable (AP) department keeps that system running smoothly by

managing cash flow, paying our valued vendors and suppliers on time, and working with them to ensure our records are accurate and maintained.



We are searching for an Accounts Payable Specialist that is self-motivated, well-organized, detail oriented and takes pride in their work.  Must be skilled in doing work accurately, vendor account reconciliations, and completing work within specified deadlines in an efficient, timely manner.



ABOUT THE JOB:

The Accounts Payable Specialist is responsible for managing and processing all accounts payable transactions in a timely and accurate manner. This role will support the Accounting Team by ensuring vendor invoices are processed and vendors are paid timely and accurately within deadlines. 

RESPONSIBILITIES:

Process vendor invoices timely and accurately including invoice entry, vendor payments, and vendor account reconciliations within deadlines

Communicate with vendors regularly to ensure our records are accurate and in agreement with our vendors

Process vendor credits within the POS system and ensure vendor credits are received and processed timely

Reconcile vendor accounts to ensure all invoices are received and processed timely and accurately

Participate in month-end close processes, including credit card reconciliation, invoice profitability reconciliation, and reconciliation of Accounts Payable Aging reports 

Provide necessary support to the Accounting Team as needed

Other special projects, as assigned





REQUIRED KNOWLEDGE, SKILLS, AND ABILITIES:

Proven proficiency with Accounting Systems (Sage Intacct a plus)

Proficiency with Google Suite, MS Excel

Excellent verbal and written skills

Strong attention to detail and accuracy

Excellent organizational and time management skills

Strong communication and interpersonal skills

Understanding of accounting principles and accounts payable processes





PREFERRED CANDIDATES:

Previous Accounts Payable experience in a similar environment preferred

Finance or Accounting degree or working towards preferred



SCHEDULE

Monday to Friday, 9:00am-6:00pm MST (Full-time)

Location:  Remote



CONFORMANCE STATEMENT:

In the performance of their respective tasks and duties all employees are expected to conform to the following:

Perform quality work within deadlines with and without direct supervision.

Interact professionally with other employees, customers and suppliers.

Work effectively as a team contributor on all assignments.

Work independently while understanding the necessity for communicating and coordinating work efforts with other employees and organizations.

title: Figma Email Designer Needed — Create Clean Marketing Emails from Existing Mockups
description:
We’re looking for a detail-oriented Figma
 designer to help turn existing mockups and brand direction into polished, conversion-focused
 designs.



This is not a “design from scratch with no direction” role. We already have mockups, references, and a clear visual direction. We need someone who can take that input and create clean, professional
 layouts in Figma that are ready for handoff.



What you’ll do

- Design marketing
s in Figma based on provided mockups and references

- Translate rough concepts or static mockups into polished
 layouts

- Keep designs clean, modern, and visually consistent with brand guidelines

- Structure
s clearly for conversion, readability, and mobile responsiveness

- Revise designs based on feedback quickly and accurately

- Prepare files in an organized way for developer handoff



What we’re looking for

- Strong Figma skills

- Experience designing
 marketing creatives

- Good eye for spacing, hierarchy, typography, and layout

- Able to follow existing brand direction rather than over-designing

- Fast, reliable, and responsive

- Strong attention to detail

- Can work from references/mockups and improve them without drifting off-brief



Nice to have

- Experience with ecommerce or DTC
 design

- Understanding of
 best practices for desktop and mobile

- Experience working with Klaviyo-style
 layouts

- Basic understanding of what makes a design easy to build in HTML



To apply

Please send:

- A few examples of
 designs you created in Figma

- A short note on your experience with
 design

- Your typical turnaround time for one

- The word “Inbox” at the top of your application so we know you read this



We care about taste, speed, and accuracy. If you can take a mockup and turn it into a sharp, production-friendly
 design, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Real Estate Appointment Setter / Cold Caller (US Hours)
description:

Book leads into quote or inspection appointments for the agent

Follow up with unresponsive or unbooked leads



Maintain accurate notes and updates inside GoHighLevel (GHL)



Track daily KPIs for calls, appointments, and follow-ups

Prior experience in appointment setting, cold calling, or customer service



Experience using GoHighLevel (GHL) for pipelines, notes, and workflows

title: Social Media Growth Strategist (Real Estate | Auckland-Focused | Remote)
description:
This is not a content role.

This is not a “post and hope” role.

This is a growth role.



We are Harcourts Hoverd & Co, a high-performance real estate business in Auckland, New Zealand, and we are looking for a proven Social Media Strategist who knows how to turn attention into opportunities, leads, and growth.



We operate across two core divisions:

• Residential Sales

• Property Management



Your job is to help us grow both aggressively and intelligently through social media.



-------------------------



The Opportunity



You will be responsible for building and executing a clear, strategic social media growth plan that drives:

• Appraisal bookings

• Property management enquiries

• Brand authority in our local market

• Recruitment of high-performing salespeople



You won’t be judged on how many posts you make.

You will be judged on results.



-------------------------



What We’re Looking For



We are NOT looking for a junior marketer or content scheduler.



We are looking for someone who:

• Thinks like a strategist first, executor second

• Understands how to build audience, trust, and conversion pipelines

• Knows how to turn content into real business outcomes

• Is data-driven, constantly testing, refining, and improving

• Has the confidence to bring ideas, direction, and leadership to the role



You should already know what good looks like and be able to take ownership from day one.



-------------------------



Your Core Responsibilities

• Develop and execute a comprehensive social media strategy aligned with business growth targets



• Create and oversee content that builds authority, trust, and engagement across:

-

- Instagram

- LinkedIn

- TikTok



• Design campaigns that generate:

- Seller enquiries

- Landlord leads



- Recruitment conversations

• Manage and optimise paid campaigns for ROI and conversion

• Analyse performance and continuously refine strategy based on data

• Work alongside our internal team (design, sales, admin) to bring campaigns to life

• Identify opportunities to differentiate and dominate in the Auckland real estate space



-------------------------



What Success Looks Like (KPIs)

• Consistent growth in qualified enquiries (not just followers)

• Increased appraisal bookings and listing opportunities

• Growth in property management leads

• Strong engagement and local audience penetration

• Measurable contribution to agent recruitment

• Clear reporting and strategic insights



-------------------------



Your Background

• Proven experience as a Social Media Strategist (real estate preferred, but not essential if results are strong)

• Demonstrated success in driving growth, leads, or revenue through social media

• Deep understanding of:

o Meta 
/Instagram)

o LinkedIn

o TikTok

• Strong grasp of paid advertising and conversion strategy

• Excellent storytelling, positioning, and content direction skills



-------------------------



Why This Role is Different

• You will have real influence on business growth

• Your ideas will be implemented, not ignored

• You will work with a high-performance, results-driven team

• You will be measured on impact, not activity

• There is long-term opportunity for the right person



-------------------------



Role Details

• Full-time remote role

• NZ-aligned hours (9:30 AM – 6:00 PM NZT)

• Stable, established company with 25+ years in the market



-------------------------



How to Apply



Send us:

1. Your CV (with links to accounts you’ve managed)

2. Examples of campaigns or content that delivered real results

3. A short video explaining:

- How you approach social media strategy

- What results you’ve achieved

- Why you’re the right fit for this role



Please mention Harcourts Hoverd & Co in your video.
salary: the rate you set in onlinejobs.ph

title: SEO Specialist Implementor (Remote)
description:
You will take ownership of assigned SEO accounts and execute initiatives aligned with the SEO strategy developed by the SEO Analyst. This role focuses on implementing, validating, and maintaining on-page and technical SEO improvements that enhance site performance, visibility, and search rankings. You will coordinate closely with the SEO Analyst to troubleshoot issues, propose corrective actions, implement approved fixes, and ensure all SEO tasks are completed accurately and on time.

We are looking for someone who wants to learn, grow, and build a long-term career with us and who values being part of a dedicated team and supportive management. If you’re seeking a short-term role, this may not be the best fit.



Key Responsibilities



SEO Execution and Ownership

 • Own day-to-day SEO implementation for assigned accounts

 • Execute Analyst-approved SEO strategies and initiatives

 • Coordinate with the SEO Analyst on troubleshooting, root-cause analysis, and proposed fixes

 • Ensure all assigned SEO tasks are completed on schedule and meet quality standards



On-Page SEO Implementation

 • Apply Analyst-provided titles, meta descriptions, header tags, alt text, and schema

 • Update content and metadata to align with approved keywords and search intent

 • Maintain consistent formatting, internal linking, and technical standards across pages



Technical SEO Support

 • Identify and address crawl errors, indexation issues, duplicate content, and broken links

 • Support Core Web Vitals, page speed, and mobile usability improvements using approved tools

 • Proactively flag technical issues and coordinate fixes with the Analyst and developers



Performance Tracking and Quality Assurance

 • Run and review audits using Screaming Frog, Google Search Console, GA4, and related tools

 • Validate that SEO implementations match Analyst instructions and function correctly

 • Document anomalies, unexpected outcomes, or risks and escalate for Analyst review



Keyword and Content Execution

 • Implement approved keyword placements across blogs, product pages, and landing pages

 • Optimize content according to SEO best practices and Analyst guidance

 • Build and maintain internal linking structures as directed



Reporting and Documentation

 • Compile SEO performance data for SEO Analysts and Client Services Managers

 • Maintain clear task documentation for completed work and open items

 • Provide before-and-after screenshots or notes to support QA and review



Collaboration and Communication

 • Work closely with SEO Analysts to align on priorities, timelines, and fixes

 • Coordinate with content teams and developers to ensure smooth implementation

 • Provide timely updates on completed tasks, blockers, and escalation items

 • Share observations and improvement ideas to support the client’s SEO roadmap



Learning and Development

 • Continue SEO training through guided practice and self-study

 • Participate in coaching sessions with SEO Analysts



Shopify SEO Implementation

Basic working knowledge of Shopify is required. The SEO Implementor will execute SEO improvements directly within the Shopify platform, including updating product and collection metadata, editing page content, maintaining internal linking, managing product visibility for Google Merchant Center, and ensuring SEO best practices across templates and structured data. The role also supports large-scale catalog updates, product organization, and feed-related fixes that support the team’s 6-pillar SEO framework, particularly Technical Health, Content Strategy, and Special Projects such as catalog expansion or platform updates. Experience working with Shopify product data, collections, and bulk editing tools is highly valued.



Key Experience Requirements

Required Skills and Tools

 • Technical SEO fundamentals

 • Screaming Frog, Google Search Console, GA4, SEMrush

 • Google Sheets and CSV workflows

 • Excel or Google Sheets formulas

 • Strong written English and disciplined documentation practices





Additional Notes

Employment Type

 • Full-time, remote

Compensation

 • USD 6 per hour, paid monthly via bank transfer

Schedule

 • Day shift, Philippine time

 • Required overlap with US team from 8:00 AM to 12:00 NN PH time

 • Daily check-in required between 11:00 AM and 12:00 NN PH time unless changed in writing



Apply Here:

 • Apply Analyst-provided titles, meta descriptions, header tags, alt text, and schema

 • Update content and metadata to align with approved keywords and search intent

 • Maintain consistent formatting, internal linking, and technical standards across pages



Technical SEO Support

 • Identify and address crawl errors, indexation issues, duplicate content, and broken links

 • Support Core Web Vitals, page speed, and mobile usability improvements using approved tools

 • Proactively flag technical issues and coordinate fixes with the Analyst and developers



Performance Tracking and Quality Assurance

 • Run and review audits using Screaming Frog, Google Search Console, GA4, and related tools

 • Validate that SEO implementations match Analyst instructions and function correctly

 • Document anomalies, unexpected outcomes, or risks and escalate for Analyst review



Keyword and Content Execution

 • Implement approved keyword placements across blogs, product pages, and landing pages

 • Optimize content according to SEO best practices and Analyst guidance

 • Build and maintain internal linking structures as directed



Reporting and Documentation

 • Compile SEO performance data for SEO Analysts and Client Services Managers

 • Maintain clear task documentation for completed work and open items

 • Provide before-and-after screenshots or notes to support QA and review



Collaboration and Communication

 • Work closely with SEO Analysts to align on priorities, timelines, and fixes

 • Coordinate with content teams and developers to ensure smooth implementation

 • Provide timely updates on completed tasks, blockers, and escalation items

 • Share observations and improvement ideas to support the client’s SEO roadmap



Learning and Development

 • Continue SEO training through guided practice and self-study

 • Participate in coaching sessions with SEO Analysts



Shopify SEO Implementation

Basic working knowledge of Shopify is required. The SEO Implementor will execute SEO improvements directly within the Shopify platform, including updating product and collection metadata, editing page content, maintaining internal linking, managing product visibility for Google Merchant Center, and ensuring SEO best practices across templates and structured data. The role also supports large-scale catalog updates, product organization, and feed-related fixes that support the team’s 6-pillar SEO framework, particularly Technical Health, Content Strategy, and Special Projects such as catalog expansion or platform updates. Experience working with Shopify product data, collections, and bulk editing tools is highly valued.



Key Experience Requirements

Required Skills and Tools

 • Technical SEO fundamentals

 • Screaming Frog, Google Search Console, GA4, SEMrush

 • Google Sheets and CSV workflows

 • Excel or Google Sheets formulas

 • Strong written English and disciplined documentation practices





Additional Notes

Employment Type

 • Full-time, remote

Compensation

 • USD 6 per hour, paid monthly via bank transfer

Schedule

 • Day shift, Philippine time

 • Required overlap with US team from 8:00 AM to 12:00 NN PH time

 • Daily check-in required between 11:00 AM and 12:00 NN PH time unless changed in writing
