-FAST learner who can add value by thinking outside the box to solve hard 
W OFFERING faster-than-average promotion cycle and compensation increase for our most outstanding performers!! Come join a fast-growing AirBNB property management and investment company!  We are looking for Long-Term, Full-Time employees to grow with us.  We are based out of Gatlinburg, TN and are currently a team of 3 VA's (have been working with me 2 years now) + Handymen/Cleaners.  



LOOKING FOR EXCEPTIONAL CANDIDATES TO GROW WITH OUR TEAM!  We are like a family and I have the team meet once per quarter to hang out with each other, go to the pool, enjoy.  I care about my team and feel like my team is almost my family.  We are all super friendly, hard-working, and looking for our next SUPERSTAR to help grow our business!  



Job Details:

You will be a Guest Relations Assistant and will be in charge of facilitating smooth check ins/outs, coordinating the cleaning staff, dealing with guest inquiries, requests, complaints, and keeping track of reviews.  You will help populate internal databases and contribute to the ongoing learning of the team by documenting your learnings diligently and assisting in the training of new assistants.



Most important skills:

1) Excellent written, spoken English and able to understand American specific phrases and behaviors

2) Expert in AirBNB, Homeaway, 
...

3) Very high attention to detail and NEVER letting things "fall through the cracks" (Never forgetting when something needs to be done/ HIGHLY accountable for your job to make sure its done fast and right)

4) Good judgement, ultra-professional demeanor, and desire to ensure the guest has a great experience

5) Fast learning curve and a go-getter, always-improving mentality

6) Extremely high organizational skills.   

7) Ability to learn new software and integrate it into your workflow.



Some daily tasks:

2) Maintaining the airbnb, homeaway, and 
 listings and calendars to ensure the calendars are accurate, and we are maximizing our bookings.

3) Communicate effectively with our staff and manage and arrange for cleanings/ repairs/ maintenance.

4) Following up aggressively to make sure tasks are being completed (a guest is asking for a toaster and they can't find it!  What do you do?)  hint: ask the housekeeper where it is first; then have them check again; then allow them to purchase one)

5) You get the idea... it's a high-touch, guest relations role where you also help think about how to improve the business.  



If this is of interest, please do let me know so we can set up an interview.  Please send me an updated resume for my review.

's with a an exciting, fast-growing Real Estate Investment company in the Hospitality space. We have occasional parties and trips for the  VA's on to bond and facilitate team-building.We may be looking into getting an office space for our team outside Manila or in Clark/Papanga.

Noah Mencia

title: Day Shift Marketing Manager – Australian Telehealth & Wellness
description:
[NOTE: Incomplete applications may not be reviewed, so be sure to follow all steps!]



Ready to level up your marketing career—without sacrificing your sleep schedule? Join an innovative Australian telehealth group where your creativity, digital skills, and ideas can help shape healthcare for thousands—all on a daytime schedule!



Why You’ll Love This Role

- No night shifts! Work Australian business hours (no more graveyard or late-night client calls).

- 100% remote work—work from anywhere in the Philippines with a stable internet connection.

- Be part of a friendly, supportive international team.

- Make a real impact—help Australians access better, more convenient care.



About the Role

We’re looking for a Marketing Manager to join our growing team and help manage multiple telehealth brands across Australia. You’ll get to plan, launch, and optimise exciting digital campaigns—across social media, websites,
, content, and more. You’ll work closely with our clinical and leadership teams, ensuring our messaging is clear, compassionate, and always compliant with Australian regulations.



What You’ll Be Doing

1. Strategy & Campaigns

- Plan, launch, and improve digital marketing strategies that help our brands grow.

- Contribute to creative brainstorming and campaign planning sessions.

- Support annual and quarterly marketing plans, including new ideas for channels and content.



2. Digital & Channel Management

- Keep websites up-to-date and on brand.

- Run organic and paid social media 
, Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, etc.).

- Monitor SEO and SEM (Google Ads); report on what’s working and what’s not.

- Assist with
 and SMS marketing campaigns.



3. Content & Brand Messaging

- Create or coordinate engaging, on-brand content—social posts, videos, blogs,
s, digital ads, and more.

- Make sure our messaging is consistent, clear, and compliant across all brands.



4. Collaboration & Communication

- Team up with our clinical, ops, and leadership groups to bring campaigns to life.

- Coordinate with partners (designers, videographers, agencies) as needed.

- Share campaign updates and insights with the wider team.



5. Performance & Reporting

- Track, analyse, and report on campaign results—traffic, conversions, ROI.

- Suggest improvements and new ideas based on data.



6. Stay Curious!

- Keep up to date with the latest digital trends, marketing tools, and creative ideas.



What We’re Looking For

- At least 2 years in digital marketing (bonus if you’ve managed multiple brands or international clients).

- Good working knowledge of WordPress, MailChimp, Google Analytics, Meta Ads Manager, and other digital marketing tools.

- Comfortable managing both organic and paid campaigns.

- Strong written and spoken English.

- Organised, creative, and detail-oriented.

- Flexible and eager to learn (healthcare experience a plus, but not required).

- Team player who can work independently.



How to Apply

Please send us:

1. Your updated resume

2. Your portfolio (best campaigns, social posts, content, etc.)

3. A short video intro (just 1–2 minutes)—tell us about yourself, your marketing experience, and why you’re excited for this role!



Ready to do meaningful work—on a healthy daytime schedule?

Apply now and help us shape the future of Australian healthcare marketing, together!

title: Marketing Manager – Australian Telehealth & Wellness
description:
Important: To ensure your application is reviewed, please carefully follow all instructions provided.



Role: Marketing Manager

Reports to: Head of Marketing



Role Overview:

The Marketing Manager is responsible for planning, executing, and optimising marketing initiatives across multiple Australian telehealth brands. The role focuses on strengthening brand awareness, supporting patient engagement, and driving sustainable growth across all brands. You will oversee end-to-end marketing activities, including digital channels, content creation, campaign management, and performance reporting, while ensuring strict compliance with Australian healthcare advertising regulations.

You will work closely with internal stakeholders, including clinical teams and leadership, to deliver clear, consistent, and compliant messaging that reflects the values of each brand. This role requires flexibility to manage multiple brands and adapt to changing priorities across campaigns and projects.



Key Responsibilities:

Strategy & Planning

- Develop, implement, and manage integrated marketing strategies across multiple telehealth brands, aligned with business objectives, brand positioning, and service offerings.

- Help plan and execute campaigns to drive brand awareness, patient enquiries, and service growth.

- Contribute to annual and quarterly marketing plans, including channel strategy and timelines.



Digital & Channel Management

1. Manage the digital marketing ecosystem for multiple brands, including:

- Website content and updates

- Organic and paid social media 
, Instagram, LinkedIn, Reddit, TikTok, YouTube, Meta, and other relevant platforms)

- SEO and SEM (Google Ads and paid search): monitor performance, track results, and report insights to optimise campaigns.

-
 marketing (EDMs) and SMS campaigns: provide support and assist when needed

2. Support campaign setup, optimisation, and ongoing performance across paid and organic channels.



Content & Brand Messaging

1. Develop clear, engaging, and compliant messaging for multiple brands that resonates with diverse patient audiences.

2. Create(when needed), review, and coordinate content across various formats, including:

- Social media posts and short-form videos

- Blog articles and educational content

-
 and SMS campaigns

- Flyers, digital ads, and other marketing assets

3. Ensure brand consistency across all touchpoints for each brand, including tone, visuals, and messaging.



Collaboration & Stakeholder Management

- Work closely with clinical, operations, and leadership teams to ensure marketing campaigns accurately reflect services and business priorities.

- Coordinate with internal & external partners and suppliers (e.g., designers, videographers, agencies) as required.

- Provide marketing insights, updates, and campaign reporting to internal stakeholders.



Performance, Reporting & Optimisation

- Track, analyse, and report on campaign performance using tools such as Google Analytics, ad platforms, and internal dashboards.

- Monitor key metrics including traffic, enquiries, conversions, and campaign ROI.

- Use data and insights to continuously optimise marketing activity and improve performance.

- Reporting and analysing marketing data to inform future marketing activity





Market & Industry Awareness

- Stay up to date with digital marketing trends, patient behaviour, and competitor activity.

- Identify opportunities to improve campaign effectiveness, content formats, and channel performance.





Skills & Experience

1. Proven experience in a marketing role; prior experience in healthcare or a regulated industry is advantageous but not required.

2. Foundational knowledge of:

- Website content management systems (WordPress)

-
 marketing platform (MailChimp)

- SEO and SEM principles

- Organic and paid social media channels (Google Analytics, Google Ads, and Meta Ads Manager)

3. Proven experience with Meta Business Suite and Ads Manager

4. Design skills preferred but not essential

5. Ability to plan, execute, and support multi-channel marketing activities across multiple brands.

6. Exposure to marketing budgets, spend tracking, or reporting.

7. Strong written and verbal communication skills.

8. High attention to detail and strong organisational skills.

9. Flexible and adaptable, with a willingness to take on new tasks and learn new skills as priorities evolve.



How to Apply:

Send us:

1. Your resume

2. Your portfolio (showcasing your best campaigns or content creations)

3. A short video introduction - share a bit about you, your marketing experience, and why this role excites you!

Let’s shape the future of healthcare marketing together!



[Kindly ensure all instructions are followed; incomplete applications may NOT move forward in the process.]

title: FOUNDER’S RIGHT HAND – OPERATIONS & PEOPLE LEAD – PALAWAN (EL NIDO)
description:
FOUNDER’S RIGHT HAND – OPERATIONS & PEOPLE LEAD – PALAWAN (EL NIDO)

(Chief of Staff / Operations Lead)



ABOUT THE COMPANY

We are a growing travel and expedition company based in Palawan, Philippines, delivering unique island experiences and multi-day expeditions to international travelers.



Our guests come from around the world to explore one of the most spectacular destinations on the planet. As the company grows, we are looking for someone who can help ensure that the organization becomes stronger, more structured, and more professional.



You will work directly with the founder and help ensure that the company operates with strong standards, clear responsibilities, and consistent follow-through.



THE ROLE

This is not a typical office job.



We are looking for someone who enjoys making organizations run better.



Someone who naturally:

• notices when things are not working

• brings structure where things are messy

• follows up until things are done

• helps teams stay aligned and accountable



You will act as the founder’s operational partner and internal compass, helping ensure that operations run smoothly and that standards are respected across the organization.



This role combines operations oversight, team leadership, and continuous improvement.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

• Act as the founder’s eyes and ears across the organization

• Maintain visibility on daily operations and team performance

• Ensure tasks, responsibilities, and follow-ups actually happen

• Detect operational problems, irregularities, or internal dysfunctions early

• Support team leaders and help resolve operational challenges

• Maintain strong standards of discipline, accountability, and professionalism

• Help improve internal processes and operational organization

• Strengthen communication and alignment across teams

• Contribute to recruitment, onboarding, and team development

• Help the company grow stronger as the organization expands



WHAT YOU BRING

• Experience in operations management, team leadership, or business coordination

• Strong organizational skills and high attention to detail

• Ability to follow through and ensure things get done properly

• Natural authority combined with fairness and good judgment

• Strong sense of responsibility and accountability

• Ability to remain calm and effective when solving problems

• An international mindset and high professional standards

• Strong written and spoken English



LOCATION & TRAVEL

The role is ideally based in El Nido, Palawan.



However, the position allows 7–10 days per month working remotely outside El Nido.



Regular travel should be expected between our main locations, including:

• El Nido

• Coron

• Puerto Princesa



APPLICATION CHECK



To confirm that you have carefully read this job description, please start your application with the words:



“Standards matter.”



Then answer the following question in 4–6 lines:

If you were responsible for supervising operations in a travel company, what types of dysfunctions or irregularities would you watch for?



Please also attach your CV to your application.



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



WHY YOU WILL LOVE THIS ROLE

• Work directly with the founder in a high-trust leadership role

• Play a key role in strengthening and structuring a growing company

• Combine leadership, operations, and organizational improvement

• Help build a strong team and professional culture

• Live and work in one of the most beautiful destinations in the world

title: Skool Community Growth Assistant
description:
We, Recharge Body System, are building a fast-growing virtual fitness community designed for busy professionals and individuals using GLP-1 medications who want to lose weight while preserving muscle, strength, and mobility.

Members join our Skool community, skool.com/killer-morning-mindset-7706,  to participate in live virtual workouts, accountability, and coaching designed to keep their bodies strong while improving long-term health.

We are looking for a Community Growth Assistant to help expand the community, support members, and build partnerships with clinics and health professionals.

This is a performance-based role with strong recurring income potential.



Primary Responsibilities

1. Member Onboarding & Engagement

Welcome new members to the Skool community

Send onboarding messages and help members get started

Encourage members to attend their first workout

Answer basic questions and direct members to resources

Help maintain a positive and motivating community culture



2. Partnership Outreach

Reach out to potential partners such as:

GLP-1 medical weight loss clinics

hormone replacement / TRT clinics

wellness centers

health influencers and community owners

The goal is to introduce our virtual strength training program as a solution to help their patients or audience maintain muscle and stay active during weight loss.



3. Member Recruitment

Help grow the community by:

messaging interested prospects

following up with leads

guiding people through the sign-up process

helping partners onboard their members



4. Community Support

Monitor activity inside the Skool community

Encourage discussion and participation

Celebrate member wins and progress

Help ensure members remain active and engaged



Compensation

This role includes recurring monthly income based on active members, plus milestone bonuses.

Recurring Commission

Assistant earns:

$20 per active member per month

Example:

Members        | Monthly Assistant Income

---------------------
Members     | $1,000/month

100 Members    | $2,000/month

250 Members    | $5,000/month

500 Members    | $10,000/month

Because the program is subscription-based, this income continues monthly as long as members stay active.



Simple Bonus Structure

Bonuses are paid when the community reaches key growth milestones.

Community Size   | Bonus

---------------------
Members     | $500

250 Members     | $1,000

500 Members     | $2,500

1,000 Members   | $5,000

Ideal Candidate

This role is ideal for someone who:

enjoys helping people improve their health

is comfortable communicating online

enjoys outreach and relationship building

is motivated by performance-based income

wants to grow with an expanding wellness brand

Experience with fitness, health, coaching communities, or online memberships is a plus but not required.



Time Commitment

Approximately 10–20 hours per week depending on community growth.





Why This Role Is Unique

Unlike most assistant roles, compensation grows every time the community grows.

Someone who helps grow the community to 500 members could earn $10,000+/month in recurring income.

This role is ideal for someone who wants to build something meaningful while helping people improve their health and strength.



To Apply

Send a short message explaining:

why this opportunity interests you

any experience with online communities or fitness

why you think you'd be a good fit for helping grow the community



Growth Partner Assistant

What you’ll do

find GLP-1 clinics

recruit influencers

onboard new members

welcome people into community

help run partnerships

You will be half sales, half community manager.

Why This Is Perfect For Your Model

Our growth will come from distribution channels, not just social media.

Example channels:

• GLP-1 clinics

• telehealth companies

• wellness centers

• Skool community owners

• influencers

An experienced growth assistant can open all these doors.



Ideal Weekly Workflow

Daily

• welcome new members

• answer DMs

• follow up with leads

Weekly

• reach out to 20 clinics or communities

• follow up with partners

• help onboard new referrals

Monthly

• recruit 1–3 new partners

• help grow membership base



Assistant Weekly Target

Example:

Activity                      | Weekly Goal

----------------------------------------------------

Clinic Outreach          | 30 Messages

Skool Communities    | 15 Messages

Influencers                 | 15 Messages

Follow-Ups                 | 40 Messages



Total:

~100 touches per week

That’s enough to consistently generate 2–5 partnerships monthly.

mber, not a freelancer.

etings.

title: InDesign Workbook Layout Designer (3-Week Project, Immediate Start)
description:
The opportunity



We're an education company based in Australia that creates practical learning kits for young entrepreneurs. Our products include card decks, handbooks, workbooks, and online courses sold globally.



We need an experienced InDesign designer to lay out a series of print-ready workbooks across our product range. The content is written. The InDesign templates are purchased. We need someone who can bring the two together quickly and professionally.



This is a focused 3-week engagement starting immediately, with the potential for ongoing work as we release new products throughout the year.



What you'll be doing



Taking fully written workbook content (provided as Word documents with clear structure) and laying it out in InDesign using pre-purchased templates. Each workbook contains exercises with writable fields, tables, reflection prompts, and planning spaces designed for the reader to fill in by hand.



Specifically:



- Laying out 4-5 workbooks (ranging from 75 to 100 exercises each, approximately
pages per book)

- Adapting InDesign templates to match our existing visual identity (bold, energetic, yellow and black palette)

- Setting up consistent page templates for different exercise types (tables, write-in fields, grids, reflection pages)

- Creating phase divider pages and section openers

- Ensuring all content is print-ready for our print-on-demand supplier (correct bleed, margins, trim, and export settings)

- Exporting final PDFs to print-on-demand specifications



What we provide



- Complete written content for each workbook (structured Word documents with every exercise, heading, and instruction)

- InDesign templates as your starting point

- Our existing visual identity and brand guidelines (colour palette, typography direction, examples of our published handbook)

- Clear feedback and direction throughout the project

- A collaborative working relationship with fast turnaround on approvals



Skills required



- Strong proficiency in Adobe InDesign (this is 95% of the job)

- Experience laying out books, workbooks, educational materials, or course content for print

- Understanding of print-on-demand specifications (bleed, safe zones, spine calculations, PDF/X export)

- Clean, readable typography and layout instincts

- Ability to create and modify master pages, paragraph styles, and character styles efficiently

- Comfortable working from Word documents and adapting content to designed layouts

- Good communication in English

- Available to start within the next few days



Nice to have



- Experience with Bookvault, IngramSpark, KDP, or similar print-on-demand platforms

- Basic Figma literacy (our card designs live in Figma, though this role is InDesign-focused)



Working arrangement



- 3-week project, starting as soon as possible

- Estimated 20-30 hours per week depending on pace

- We work on Australian Eastern time (AEST/AEDT) but are flexible on hours as long as communication is responsive during overlapping windows

- All work delivered via shared cloud folder (Google Drive)

- Regular check-ins via chat or video call



How to apply



Please include:



1. Your portfolio or samples showing book/workbook/educational layout work in InDesign (this is the most important thing)

2. A brief note on your experience with print-ready production and any print-on-demand platforms you've worked with

3. Your availability over the next 3 weeks and your hourly or project rate

4. How soon you could start



We're looking for someone who takes pride in clean, professional layout work and can move quickly with clear direction. If you've laid out educational content, workbooks, or course materials before, you're exactly who we're looking for.

title: Financial Director (Accountant or CPA)
description:
Role Overview

We are seeking an experienced and forward-thinking Financial Director (FD) to oversee our company's financial health, strategy, and operations. This senior role focuses on high-level planning, budgeting, forecasting, risk management, and compliance, while leading finance teams and advising leadership on financial decisions to support growth and sustainability.



The ideal candidate brings deep expertise in US financial regulations, holds the appropriate US certifications, and is equally comfortable leveraging modern AI-powered tools to drive financial efficiency, insight, and innovation.



Key Responsibilities



Strategic Planning

•	Develop and implement financial strategies, policies, and long-term plans to achieve company goals.

•	Align financial planning with business objectives, market conditions, and growth targets.

•	Identify and evaluate AI-powered forecasting and planning tools to enhance strategic decision-making.



Financial Management

•	Oversee budgeting, forecasting, financial reporting (monthly, quarterly, annual), and cash flow management.

•	Research, evaluate, and implement AI-driven financial tools and platforms to automate reporting, improve accuracy, and streamline workflows.

•	Integrate AI solutions into existing financial systems, ensuring compatibility, data integrity, and regulatory compliance.

•	Stay current with emerging fintech and AI advancements relevant to financial operations.



Leadership & Team Management

•	Lead, train, and mentor accounting, finance, and analyst teams, ensuring efficient workflows.

•	Champion the adoption of AI tools within the finance department, providing training and change management support.

•	Foster a culture of continuous improvement and data-driven decision-making.



Risk & Compliance

•	Implement internal controls, manage financial risks, ensure regulatory compliance (GAAP, SEC, IRS, SOX where applicable), and coordinate with external auditors.

•	Ensure all AI tools and automated systems used in financial operations meet US regulatory and compliance standards.

•	Assess and mitigate risks associated with AI integration, including data privacy, model accuracy, and audit trail requirements.



Performance Analysis

•	Analyze financial data, trends, and KPIs to provide strategic recommendations for profitability and efficiency.

•	Leverage AI and advanced analytics tools to surface insights, identify anomalies, and model financial scenarios.

•	Evaluate and recommend AI tools for predictive analytics, expense management, and real-time financial monitoring.



Stakeholder Communication

•	Present financial reports and insights to the CEO, board, investors, and other stakeholders.

•	Communicate the benefits and risks of AI integration clearly to non-technical leadership and board members.

•	Translate AI-generated insights into actionable business narratives.



Investment & Capital

•	Evaluate investment opportunities, manage capital expenditures, and advise on fundraising.

•	Use AI-assisted tools to model investment scenarios, assess ROI, and support capital allocation decisions.

•	Identify and recommend AI technology investments that deliver measurable financial value.



Essential Skills & Qualifications

US Credentials & Regulatory Knowledge (Required)

•	CPA (Certified Public Accountant) license — active and in good standing with a US state board.

•	In-depth knowledge of US GAAP, SEC reporting requirements, IRS regulations, and SOX compliance.

•	Familiarity with FASB standards and other applicable US financial reporting frameworks.

•	Additional credentials such as CFA (Chartered Financial Analyst) or MBA are a strong plus.



AI & Technology Proficiency

•	Demonstrated ability to research, evaluate, and implement AI tools within a finance function.

•	Comfortable using AI-powered platforms for financial forecasting, reporting automation, anomaly detection, and scenario modeling (e.g., Workday Adaptive Planning, Planful, Datarails, Mosaic, or similar).

•	Understanding of how to integrate AI tools with existing ERP and accounting systems (e.g., QuickBooks, NetSuite, SAP, Oracle).

•	Ability to assess AI tools for compliance with US financial regulations and data privacy requirements (e.g., SOC 2, GDPR where applicable).

•	Critical mindset for evaluating AI outputs — understanding limitations, biases, and the importance of human oversight.

•	Experience with data visualization tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau) and willingness to adopt AI-enhanced analytics.



Core Financial Competencies

•	Strong financial acumen, analytical skills, and numerical proficiency.

•	Strategic thinking and executive leadership abilities.

•	Excellent communication, presentation, and negotiation skills.

•	Proven experience managing and mentoring finance teams.

•	Track record of overseeing audits, managing cash flow, and ensuring regulatory adherence.

•	Experience presenting financial strategy and insights to C-suite and board-level stakeholders.



Experience

•	10+ years of progressive finance experience, with at least 3–5 years in a senior financial leadership role.

•	Experience in a US-based company with multi-state or multi-entity structures preferred.

•	Proven history of successfully implementing new financial systems or technologies.

•	Experience leading or participating in AI/technology transformation initiatives is highly desirable.

title: Urgent! Property Management Virtual Assistant (Leasing, Airbnb & Bookkeeping)
description:
APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS:



Submit your application to:





 Subject Format:

Full Name – Executive Virtual Assistant (Property Management) – Source of Job Posting

(e.g.,
, OLJ, Indeed, LinkedIn)



REQUIRED DOCUMENTS

Please ensure all of the following are included in your submission:

- Updated PDF Résumé (highlighting accounting experience and tools used)

- 1–2-minute video introduction (attached directly; Loom links are not accepted)

Brief self-introduction

- Summary of relevant Executive Virtual Assistant (Property Management) experience

- Reason for applying



VIDEO INTRODUCTION GUIDELINES (Please read carefully)

- Loom links are not accepted due to download restrictions. If you use Loom, please download the video file and attach it directly to your
 response.

- You may record using Zoom or a mobile device.

- Ensure you are in professional attire, in a quiet environment, with a clean and professional background.



IMPORTANT REMINDER

Failure to follow the above instructions may result in delays in processing your application. These guidelines are part of our evaluation process to assess attention to detail and the ability to follow instructions accurately.



Overview

We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support daily property management operations. This role combines leasing coordination, short-term rental management, and basic bookkeeping to ensure efficient operations and accurate financial tracking across multiple properties.



Key Responsibilities



1. Leasing & Tenant Coordination (Income Side)

- Respond to rental inquiries across platforms such as Zillow, Airbnb, and VRBO

- Schedule and coordinate property showings with prospective tenants

- Distribute rental applications and guide applicants through the process

- Conduct consistent follow-ups to maximize occupancy rates

- Post, update, and manage property listings as units become available



2. Airbnb / Short-Term Rental Management

- Respond promptly and professionally to guest inquiries and messages

- Adjust nightly pricing based on demand, trends, and seasonality

- Send, confirm, and manage check-in instructions

- Coordinate with cleaning teams to ensure unit readiness and turnover efficiency

- Monitor guest reviews and escalate issues when necessary



3. Bookkeeping & Financial Tracking (Critical Function)

- No CPA required; strong organizational and accuracy skills are essential.



Rent Tracking

- Record and reconcile incoming rent payments

- Follow up on late or missed payments



Airbnb Income Tracking

- Log bookings and track revenue accurately

- Monitor cleaning fees, platform charges, and related expenses

- Maintain records of Airbnb-related financial activity



Expense Tracking

- Record expenses including repairs, utilities, supplies, and contractor payments

- Maintain accurate, up-to-date financial records

Tools: QuickBooks, Excel, Google Sheets



4. Weekly Reporting

Prepare and submit a weekly property performance report, including:

- Occupancy status

- Rent collected

- Airbnb revenue

- Expenses and maintenance costs

- Net income



Sample Metrics:

- Total properties managed

- Occupancy vs. vacancy rates

- Weekly revenue (Rent + Airbnb)

- Total expenses and repairs

- Net operating income



Ideal Candidate Profile

- Proven experience in real estate or property management

- Highly organized with strong attention to detail

- Comfortable handling financial data and basic bookkeeping tasks

- Proficient in spreadsheets and accounting tools

- Strong communication skills (phone,
, and chat)

- Professional, responsive, and customer-focused



Why This Role Matters

This position is essential in maintaining high occupancy rates, ensuring excellent guest and tenant experiences, and delivering accurate financial tracking—providing clear visibility into overall property performance

title: HubSpot Solutions Engineer
description:
The Role





We are looking for an experienced HubSpot Solutions Engineer / Developer to support the implementation of HubSpot across a range of client projects.



This is a project based contract role focused on designing and implementing HubSpot solutions that connect marketing, sales, and revenue data across multiple systems.



Our goal is to ensure HubSpot becomes the single source of truth for marketing and sales activity, allowing us and our clients to clearly track the impact of marketing spend through to revenue generation.



Projects vary in size and complexity, from straightforward HubSpot setups to advanced implementations involving custom objects, integrations, automation, and attribution reporting.



You will collaborate with our internal team during the Scope of Work (SoW) stage to validate technical approaches, then take ownership of implementation once the project begins.



This role is fully remote and does not require direct client communication.







Key Responsibilities



HubSpot Setup and Configuration

• HubSpot portal setup and configuration

• Marketing Hub and Sales Hub configuration

• Pipeline and lifecycle stage setup

• Workflow automation

• CRM configuration and property management



CRM Architecture

• Designing scalable HubSpot CRM data structures

• Implementing custom objects and associations

• Managing complex property structures and lifecycle processes

• Ensuring data quality and consistency across systems



Integrations and Data Connectivity

• Integrating HubSpot with marketing and analytics platforms

• Implementing API based integrations where required

• Configuring middleware tools such as Zapier, Make, or similar automation platforms

• Connecting HubSpot with external systems such as data warehouses and analytics platforms



Marketing Systems Integration

Common platforms we connect with HubSpot include:

• Google Ads

• Meta Ads

• Google Analytics (GA4)

• Webinar platforms

• Call tracking systems

• Form tools

• Marketing analytics platforms



Marketing Attribution and Revenue Tracking

• Configuring HubSpot attribution reporting

• Implementing marketing to revenue reporting frameworks

• Enabling closed loop reporting between marketing activity and revenue

• Supporting offline conversion tracking and ad platform integrations



CMS / Content Hub Support

• Supporting configuration of HubSpot CMS / Content Hub environments

• Assisting with blog and content configuration when required

• Collaborating with internal web developers on HubSpot based websites or landing pages







What We Are Looking For



Core Experience

• Strong experience implementing HubSpot Marketing Hub and Sales Hub

• Designing CRM architectures within HubSpot

• Workflow automation and lifecycle management

• HubSpot reporting and dashboards

• Managing complex data structures within HubSpot



Technical Capabilities

• Experience working with HubSpot APIs and private apps

• Experience implementing custom objects and complex CRM data models

• Experience building integrations using middleware tools such as Zapier or Make

• Experience connecting HubSpot with external marketing and analytics platforms

• Strong understanding of marketing attribution and CRM data flows



Highly Regarded

• Experience with HubSpot CMS / Content Hub

• Experience with advanced HubSpot CRM architecture

• Experience working with marketing agencies or RevOps teams

• Experience implementing marketing attribution and revenue tracking systems

• Experience integrating HubSpot with advertising platforms and analytics tools



Working Model

• Contract role

• Project based engagement

• Fully remote

• Global candidates welcome

• Internal team manages client communication and project scoping

• Contractor responsible for technical implementation







Ideal Candidate



The ideal candidate is a senior HubSpot implementer or solutions engineer who is comfortable working across both RevOps architecture and technical implementation.



You should be confident in translating project scopes into technical implementation plans, designing scalable HubSpot CRM structures, integrating marketing and analytics systems with HubSpot, and enabling clear reporting from marketing activity through to revenue.



You will act as a technical partner to our internal team, helping us deliver increasingly complex HubSpot implementations as our client portfolio grows.







How to Apply



Please include:

• A brief overview of your HubSpot implementation experience

• Examples of complex HubSpot projects you have delivered

• Details of integrations or CRM architectures you have built

title: Mehanical engineer/ Industrial Engineer/ Mechanical Designer
description:
Mehanical engineer/ Industrial Engineer/ Mechanical Designer



Job Description



A US-based manufacturing company is looking for a qualified Mehanical engineer/ Industrial Engineer/ Mechanical Designer  to join our team. We are a recognized leader in the design and manufacture of ergonomic, interactive technical products for various industries.



Our customers include medical/healthcare, public safety/mission control, all government agencies, IT, and cleanroom ergonomic products.



Required Professional Skills:

Produce accurate 2D and 3D shop drawings to adequately show and dimension all machined sheet metal welded, assembly parts, part numbers, specifications for bends, welding, assembly, etc.

Develop and maintain bill of materials and manufacturing documents.

Produce drawings using AutoCAD 3D and Autodesk Inventor software

Drafting and design responsibilities would include incorporating modifications into existing designs, developing component models and scaling fabrication drawings from initial concept.

Evaluate existing designs and processes and provide recommendations for improving productivity and increasing efficiency throughout.

Work with managers to solve problems and offer ideas for improving processes



Requirements:

Must be proficient with AutoCAD 3D and Autodesk Inventor (2007+) software

This individual must be self-motivated and able to perform routine duties with some supervision.

Experience in sheet metal fabrication and machine shop environment is preferred

Experience in metal casting and plastic molding is an advantage.

Follow verbal and written instructions



Autodesk Inventor and AutoCAD 3D are required.



Schedule: Monday to Friday, from 9:00 a.m. to 6:00 p.m. US EST, with a one-hour lunch break



NOTE: Please read!!!

Please send a link to your resume in PDF or Word format and your Teams account. Please submit your application if you are proficient in Autodesk Inventor and AutoCAD 3D.

title: Full Time Operations Manager for an Anime apparel company
description:
QUICK POINTS



• We are looking to hire 1 Operations Manager (long-term role)

• Help run and organize a fast-growing ecommerce brand

• Ecommerce experience is a BIG PLUS

• Being an Anime fan is a BIG PLUS but not necessary

• USD $980 per month + Performance Bonuses

• Work for a US company

• Excellent written English required, spoken English not necessary

• Needs to be highly organized, proactive, and self-motivated

• Flexible working hours

• Full-time preferred (30–40 hours/week)

• Work from home or anywhere you prefer



?



ABOUT US



We are an ecommerce company that specializes in anime apparel. We’ve been in business for over 7 years and currently run multiple successful brands that sell print-on-demand and custom anime products.



We are a fast-moving company focused on growth, launching new products consistently, and improving our systems. Our customers love our products and we are constantly pushing to improve operations, marketing, and overall performance.



?



ABOUT THE ROLE



We are looking for a highly organized and proactive Operations Manager to help run the day-to-day operations of the business.



This is a key role in the company. You will work directly with the founder to help turn ideas into execution, manage tasks across the team, and ensure everything runs smoothly.



This is NOT just a basic assistant role. We are looking for someone who can take ownership, solve problems, and help improve systems over time.



This position offers strong room for growth. The right candidate can grow into a General Manager role with increased compensation and responsibility.



We will start with a trial period (1–2 months) to ensure it’s a good fit, then move into a long-term position.



?



YOUR MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES



• Manage day-to-day operations of the business

• Take ideas from the founder and turn them into clear tasks/projects

• Assign and track tasks for tea
mbers (designers, editors, VAs, etc.)

• Ensure projects are completed on time



• Oversee product launches (coordinate designs, uploads, etc.)

• Monitor order fulfillment, shipping, and logistics issues

• Communicate with suppliers or partners when needed



• Coordinate marketing execution:

 • Influencer campaigns

 •
/SMS campaigns

 • Promotions and product drops



• Oversee website operations:

 • Product uploads

 • Basic SEO checks (training will be provided)

 • Ensuring clean and accurate product pages



• Manage customer support flow and handle escalations



• Track and report key metrics weekly:

 • Revenue

 • Product performance

 • Issues / bottlenecks



?



OTHER RESPONSIBILITIES MAY INCLUDE



• Building and improving SOPs (standard operating procedures)

• Helping hire and manage freelancers

• Identifying inefficiencies and suggesting improvements

• Light data analysis and reporting

• General problem-solving across the business



?



TOOLS WE USE



• Slack

• Notion / Trello / ClickUp (task management)

• Google Drive / Dropbox

• Shopify / WooCommerce

• Klaviyo 
 marketing)

• Meta Ads (basic understanding is a plus)



?



ABOUT YOU



The skills of the most suitable candidate:



• Strong organizational and project management skills

• Experience working with ecommerce businesses (preferred)

• Ability to manage multiple tasks and priorities at once

• Comfortable working with remote teams



• Good understanding of how ecommerce businesses operate

• Basic understanding of marketing (ads,
, influencers) is a plus



?



OUR PERFECT CANDIDATE



• Proactive and takes initiative (does not wait for instructions)

• Strong problem solver

• Detail-oriented and highly organized

• Fast communicator



• Comfortable with ambiguity and figuring things out

• Self-motivated and takes pride in their work

• Interested in long-term growth within the company



?



WHAT’S IN IT FOR YOU



• Full-time position (30–40 hours/week)

• Flexible schedule, you manage your own hours

• Work from anywhere

• USD $980 per month + Performance Bonuses



• Long-term opportunity with room to grow into a General Manager role

• Work directly with the founder and have real impact on the business

• Very chill but high-performance environment



?



HOW TO APPLY



If you apply, we’ll respond promptly and keep you updated throughout the process.



As part of the hiring process, there will be the following steps:



1 - Tell us about your experience with ecommerce or operations



2 - Describe a situation where you improved a process or solved a problem



3 - List your 3 favorite Anime if you're a fan



If selected, we will move you to the next stage which includes a short test task to evaluate your thinking and organization



?



PS: Please include the word “Nakama” in your application so we know you read the entire job description.

title: Solar Administrator / Solar Engineer (Australia)
description:
Join Australia’s leading solar support team!



We’re looking for an experienced Solar Admin Assistant to join our growing offshore team. You’ll be supporting Australian solar companies with everything from grid connection applications to STC submissions — helping streamline their operations and keep installs moving smoothly.



Key Responsibilities:

- Process STC forms and manage compliance documentation.

- Submit and track GridConnect pre-approvals and connection applications with various DNSPs across Australia.

- Send out handover kits via Pylon, OpenSolar, or other platforms as required.

- Manage job records, checklists, and customer data for multiple clients.

- Liaise professionally with Australian installers, office staff, and customers as needed.

- Work across multiple clients and adapt quickly to their systems and processes.



Advantage experience to handle:



Commercial Solar Administration

- Manage DNSP grid connection applications for commercial solar systems (30 kW+)

- Prepare and submit pre-approval applications

- Respond to DNSP technical queries and requests for additional information

- Manage export limits, zero-export requirements, and protection conditions

- Upload and manage documentation across DNSP portals



Solar + Battery Projects

- Support commercial battery approvals and documentation

- Ensure batteries are included correctly in DNSP approvals and SLDs

- Manage commissioning evidence and compliance documentation

- Coordinate with installers to resolve approval or documentation gaps



Compliance & Documentation



Review and manage:

- Single Line Diagrams (SLDs)

- CEC-compliant documentation

- Installer and designer accreditation evidence

- Commissioning photos and reports

- Prepare STC documentation for commercial systems

- Package compliance folders for audit readiness



Liaise with:

- Australian installers and electricians

- STC traders

- Retailers and DNSPs 

- Track job status, approvals, and outstanding actions

- Flag risks, delays, or compliance issues early and escalate appropriately



Requirements:



- Direct experience working with Australian solar companies



Hands-on experience with:

- Grid connection applications

- STCs for commercial solar

- Australian DNSP portals



A solid understanding of:

- Export limits and DNSP pre-approval requirements

- Solar + battery integration fundamentals

- Clean Energy Council (CEC) compliance frameworks



Essential:

- Experience across multiple Australian states

- Experience managing commercial metering coordination

- Familiarity with CRMs such as Pylon, OpenSolar, ServiceM8, or similar

- Experience supporting mid-to-high volume solar installers

- Customer service or technical solar knowledge is highly essential



Why You’ll Love Working With Us

- AU time zone working hours (no graveyard shifts)

- We’re a passionate, forward-thinking team (and genuinely good humans)

- Growth opportunities as we expand

- Supportive culture where initiatives and ideas are celebrated



*Only applications submitted through the link will be considered.

*Please do not apply if you don't have the qualifications, thank you!



Apply via:

title: Executive Assistant / Project Manager
description:
We’re hiring a highly organized, systems-minded Team Admin / Executive Assistant / Project Manager to support leadership and keep the team operating smoothly.



This role is for someone who thinks in systems, spots gaps before they become problems, stays ahead of deadlines, and keeps the entire team aligned without needing constant supervision. You are here to support leadership, manage projects, and keep systems running smoothly so the rest of the team can focus on execution.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important, and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an exceptional place to work with strong systems, high standards, and real impact, not just managing tasks for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you think in priorities, timelines, and dependencies? Do you enjoy turning scattered ideas into structured plans with clear owners and deadlines? Are you the type who follows up before being asked and catches details others miss? Do you take pride in building clean systems, documenting processes properly, and keeping teams aligned without constant supervision?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



RESPONSIBILITIES:

Admin & Team Support

- Manage calendars, meetings, follow-ups, and reminders

- Handle inbox organization and message triage

- Prepare documents, trackers, and internal updates

- Keep files, folders, and naming systems clean and consistent



Project Management

- Track ongoing projects, deadlines, and dependencies

- Break down tasks and assign owners

- Follow up on deliverables and flag risks early

- Keep project boards and trackers up to date (e.g. Notion, Monday, ClickUp, Sheets)



Systems & Process

- Build and improve simple systems that reduce back-and-forth

- Document SOPs and workflows as things evolve

- Spot inefficiencies and automation opportunities, and suggest, design, and implement improvements

- Maintain dashboards, trackers, and recurring reports



Communication & Coordination

- Act as the bridge between leadership and the team

- Clarify priorities and next steps after meetings

- Ensure instructions are understood and executed correctly

- Keep everyone aligned without micromanaging



REQUIREMENTS:

Experience & Capability

- Must have extensive experience as an executive assistant, chief of staff, or operations associate

- Project management experience and comfortable managing and driving multiple large projects

- Must have previous experience managing people. You may not have any direct reports, but the experience is important

- Must have experience automating workflows and designing workflow processes with automation in mind. You may not be individually responsible for building them, but you should already have the experience to handle basic tasks and understand how the process works

- Comfortable with outcome and goal-based delegation and does not need to be told individual tasks

- Experience with Google Suite and GoHighLevel CRM is a plus, but not required

- Should be fluent in AI, but not reliant on it to think for you



Work Style & Standards

- Extremely detail-oriented

- Excellent organizational skills

- Excellent time management skills

- Strong written communication

- Strong written and spoken English communication skills; near-native level preferred

- Comfortable juggling multiple priorities

- Must love creating, refining, and working with standard operating processes (SOPs)

- Proactive. You don’t wait to be told something is broken, you anticipate it before it breaks

- Must move with a sense of speed and urgency in everything



Ownership & Mindset

- Extremely growth-oriented and hungry to learn

- You are the type of person who follows through every single time, no matter what, and always gets the job done. No excuses, no matter what pops up

- You are the type of person who is delighted when the client or the person you're preparing something for is delighted

- You want meaningful work around people who are incredibly smart, hard-working, and dedicated, with a phenomenal culture. We work hard, but we have fun doing it together



Availability & Technical Requirements

- A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION IS REQUIRED (at least 150mbps)

- Must be willing to work long hours and be available to respond to messages within a 12-hour daily window (not necessarily working 12 hours a day, but reliably reachable and able to respond quickly if something urgent comes up)



Preferred:

- Experience working as a process engineer, manufacturing engineer, or industrial engineer is preferred, but not required

- Experience designing team workflows, augmenting existing workflows with automation, and/or automating existing workflows is a strong bonus, but not required



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.





STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project, estimated to be 2-3 hours of work for each (a total of $20-40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Team Admin / Assistant / Project Manager with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your video editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

title: Outbound Enrollment Advisor – Career Certification Programs (Remote, EST)
description:
Are you passionate about education and skilled in building meaningful connections? Do you have strong English communication skills and a deep familiarity with U.S. culture? Join a leading U.S. online career school that empowers students to achieve their dreams in Information Technology and Project Management. We are seeking Educational Sales Associates who can inspire students, guide them toward the right career path, and represent our programs with professionalism and confidence.



Responsibilities:

• Serve as the primary point of contact for prospective students, guiding them through the enrollment process.

• Present and promote our training programs, highlighting their value in preparing students for high-demand careers.

• Conduct consultations to understand student needs, goals, and financial considerations, and recommend appropriate programs.

• Follow up with leads, build strong relationships, and close enrollments.

• Collaborate with admissions, support, and academic teams to ensure a seamless student onboarding experience.

• Stay informed on current industry trends, certification requirements, and job market opportunities to best advise students.

• Participate in regular tea
etings, sales training sessions, and ongoing professional development.

Requirements:

• Proven sales, admissions, or customer service experience with a strong record of meeting or exceeding goals.

• Strong English proficiency and cultural familiarity with the United States (required to communicate effectively with U.S. students).

• Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, both written and verbal.

• Ability to work independently as well as collaboratively within a team.

• Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

• Familiarity with IT and business career certifications (e.g., CompTIA A+, PMI PMP) is a strong plus.

Compensation & Benefits:

title: Accounts Payable Assistant (WFH – Philippines)
description:
We are looking for an experienced Accounts Payable Assistant based in the Philippines to join our Finance team. 

This is a stable, long-term role working with colleagues across multiple countries in a supportive and experienced finance team. 

 

About Us 

MACVAD is an established international sourcing and distribution company with over 60 years of success. We are specialist sourcing and supply agents working across seven countries, supplying major retailers around the world. 

Our success comes from carefully managed growth and strong long-term relationships with both suppliers and customers. Our Finance team works closely with colleagues across different locations and is known for building strong and reliable relationships internally and externally. 

You will be joining a supportive team with solid systems and processes, where accuracy, accountability and teamwork are highly valued. 

 

The Role 

This role focuses on end-to-end Accounts Payable processing, ensuring supplier invoices and payments are processed accurately and supported by the correct documentation. 

Because MACVAD operates internationally, this role also involves working with multiple currencies, different tax jurisdictions, and intercompany transactions. 

 

Key Responsibilities 

* Processing supplier invoices and managing the Accounts Payable workflow 

* Managing invoice authorisation processes and ensuring correct approvals 

* Preparing and processing supplier payments 

* Performing supplier reconciliations 

* Processing company credit card transactions 

* Managing intercompany invoices and reconciliations between different group entities 

* Handling multi-currency supplier invoices and exchange rate differences 

* Reviewing supplier invoices to ensure correct VAT / GST treatment 

* Supporting colleagues with transactional finance queries 

* Maintaining accurate documentation and records 

Trading & Shipping Document Review 

A key part of this role involves reviewing documentation to ensure invoices should be paid. 

This includes checking and matching: 

* Purchase Orders 

* Bills of Lading 

* Packing Lists 

* Commercial Invoices 

The goal is to ensure the accuracy of supplier invoices and confirm that payment terms and shipping documentation align before payments are processed. 

 

About You 

You are someone who enjoys working with numbers and takes pride in producing accurate work. You are organised, efficient and naturally attentive to detail. 

You also understand the importance of strong supplier relationships and provide excellent customer service when dealing with queries. 

 

Requirements 

* Minimum 5 years accounting experience 

* Strong end-to-end Accounts Payable experience 

* Experience processing supplier invoices, reconciliations and payments 

* Experience working with multi-currency transactions and exchange rates 

* Experience handling intercompany transactions 

* Understanding of VAT / GST treatment on supplier invoices 

* High attention to detail and accuracy 

* Strong organisational and follow-up skills 

* Excellent written communication 

* Ability to work independently in a remote environment 

* Reliable internet connection 

 

Systems Experience 

Experience with Microsoft Dynamics / Business Central would be an advantage. 

However, candidates with experience using other ERP systems such as SAP, NetSuite, Sage, AX or Xero are also encouraged to apply. 

 

Advantageous Experience 

* Experience working in trading, sourcing, logistics or supply businesses 

* Familiarity with shipping documentation 

* German language skills 

 

Personal Qualities 

We are looking for someone who: 

* Has a positive and easy-going working style 

* Enjoys supporting colleagues 

* Has a “can do” attitude 

* Is dependable and takes ownership of their work 

* Is comfortable working in an international team environment 

 

Why Join MACVAD? 

* Established international company with strong client relationships 

* Supportive and experienced finance team 

* Exposure to international business operations 

* Stable long-term role with opportunities to grow 

 

How to Apply 

If this role sounds like a good fit for you, please apply and please include a link to your CV answer the following questions when applying: 

1. How many years of Accounts Payable experience do you have? Please briefly describe the AP tasks you handled. 

2. Have you processed invoices in multiple currencies or handled exchange rate differences? Please explain your experience. 

3. Have you worked with intercompany transactions or reconciliations between different entities? 

4. What accounting or ERP systems have you used in your previous roles? 

5. Do you have experience reviewing shipping or trading documents (e.g., Purchase Orders, Bills of Lading, Packing Lists, Commercial Invoices)? 

6. What is your expected monthly salary (in PHP)? 

7. Please provide a link to your CV or resume.

What We Offer:

To Apply:

title: General Admin & Finance
description:
## About Zelix Labs



Zelix Labs is a Singapore-based digital growth agency that helps SMBs across Southeast Asia grow through AI-powered marketing automation, WhatsApp business messaging, and paid advertising. As we grow, we need someone to keep the operational and financial side of the business running smoothly so the founders and delivery team can focus on clients.



---



## The Role



You will handle the day-to-day administrative and financial operations of Zelix Labs. This includes invoicing, expense tracking, contractor payments, document management, and general operational support. You will be the person who makes sure nothing falls through the cracks on the business operations side.



This is a foundational role — not glamorous, but essential. The right person is organised, reliable, detail-oriented, and takes pride in keeping things running smoothly.



---



## What You Will Do



**Finance (approximately 50% of time):**



- Prepare and send client invoices (monthly retainers, one-time project fees)

- Track payments received and follow up on overdue invoices

- Record expenses and maintain financial records in Google Sheets or accounting software

- Process contractor payments — track hours/deliverables and prepare payment summaries

- Reconcile ad spend billing (Meta, Google, TikTok) against client invoices to ensure accuracy

- Prepare monthly financial summaries for the founders — revenue, expenses, outstanding payments, cash position

- Support annual tax preparation and filing by maintaining organised records

- Manage receipts and documentation for expense claims



**Admin (approximately 50% of time):**



- Maintain the company's document library — contracts, proposals, SOPs, client files

- Schedule meetings and manage the founders' calendars when needed

- Coordinate onboarding logistics for new tea
mbers — access setup, tool accounts, documentation

- Manage software subscriptions and renewals — track what we pay for, when renewals are due, and flag unused tools

- Handle correspondence — respond to routine
s, forward client enquiries to the right tea
mber

- Maintain the internal team directory and contact information

- Assist with ad-hoc operational tasks — research, data entry, report formatting

- Help maintain CRM records and client data hygiene



---



## What We Are Looking For



**Must have:**



- 2+ years of experience in administrative support, bookkeeping, virtual assistant, or office management

- Strong organisational skills — you keep track of deadlines, follow up on pending items, and do not let things slip

- Attention to detail — especially with numbers. Invoice errors erode client trust.

- Proficiency with Google Workspace (Sheets, Docs, Drive, Calendar)

- Basic bookkeeping/accounting knowledge — you understand invoices, expenses, profit and loss, and cash flow at a fundamental level

- Good written English for professional correspondence

- Trustworthy and discreet — you will handle financial information and contracts

- Self-directed — you do not need to be told to follow up on an overdue invoice or renew an expiring subscription



**Nice to have:**



- Experience with accounting software (Xero, QuickBooks, Wave, or similar)

- Experience with Singapore business administration (IRAS, ACRA basics)

- Experience in a digital marketing agency or tech company

- Familiarity with project management tools (Notion, Asana, Trello, or similar)

- Experience managing contractor relationships and payments across multiple currencies (SGD, PHP, USD)

- Basic understanding of SaaS billing models and subscription management



---



## What We Provide



- Premium AI tools subscription — useful for drafting correspondence, formatting documents, and summarising financial data

- Clear processes and templates — we are building SOPs for everything and you will help maintain them

- A growing company where you will be the first dedicated admin/finance person — significant ownership of the function

- Direct access to the founders

- Stable, long-term role — this need does not go away as we grow; it gets more important



---



## Compensation



?25,000 – ?37,500/month (approximately SGD 530 – 800) depending on experience.



Higher range for candidates with bookkeeping skills or Singapore business admin experience.



---



## How to Apply



Please include:



1. A short Loom video (3–5 minutes) walking us through how you keep finances and admin organised in your current or most recent role — show your spreadsheets, tools, or systems if possible. This is the single most important part of your application.

2. Your OnlineJobs.ph profile link

3. A brief summary of your admin/finance experience — what you managed, the size of the business, and the tools you used

4. Your proficiency level with spreadsheets (basic, intermediate, advanced) — be honest

5. Whether you have experience with invoicing, bookkeeping, or financial record-keeping

6. Your availability to start

title: Order Fulfillment Specialist (SPS Commerce / EDI)
description:
Are you experienced in managing order fulfillment, retailer compliance, and 3PL coordination?



We’re looking for a detail-oriented Order Fulfillment Specialist who can manage order flow end-to-end, ensure accuracy, and proactively resolve issues before they escalate.



What You’ll Do

• Manage order uploads via SPS Commerce and retailer portals

• Monitor open orders and ensure on-time fulfillment

• Review daily reports and flag discrepancies or risks

• Coordinate with 3PL partners to ensure smooth operations

• Handle retailer disputes, invoicing, and compliance requirements

• Track orders end-to-end and resolve delays proactively

• Maintain accurate records and reporting



What We’re Looking For

• 1–2+ years in fulfillment, logistics, 3PL, or retail operations

• Hands-on experience with SPS Commerce / EDI systems

• Strong understanding of order pipelines and fulfillment workflows

• Experience with retailer compliance, disputes, and invoicing

• Strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple deadlines

• Clear and professional communication skills

• Proficient in Excel or Google Sheets



Nice to Have

• Experience with Cin7 or similar systems

• Familiarity with vendor routing guides

• Experience working with 3PL or warehouse teams



Please answer the screening questions below. Failure to do so will affect your application. 

1. Can you walk me through your experience managing purchase orders or e-commerce orders? What systems or platforms did you use to process and track them?



2. Have you worked with retailer portals or EDI platforms such as SPS Commerce or similar systems? If yes, what tasks were you responsible for within those platforms?



3. How did you typically monitor open orders to ensure they shipped on time? What steps did you take if you noticed an order might miss its shipping deadline?



4. Have you worked directly with warehouses or third-party logistics (3PL) partners? What did your communication and coordination with them usually involve?



5. Tell us about a time an order or shipment issue occurred (e.g., inventory shortage, shipment delay, incorrect quantities). How did you identify the problem and resolve it?



6. What types of operational reports or tracking did you regularly maintain (e.g., order reports, inventory tracking, shipment status)?

title: Marketing Executive
description:
## About Zelix Labs



Zelix Labs is a Singapore-based digital growth agency that helps SMBs across Southeast Asia grow through AI-powered marketing automation, WhatsApp business messaging, and paid advertising. We are building a new kind of agency — one where AI tools amplify every tea
mber's output.



We are looking for a Marketing Executive who can help us grow our own brand while supporting client marketing initiatives.



---



## The Role



This is a hybrid role. You will split your time between growing Zelix Labs' own brand presence (content, social media, case studies, lead generation) and supporting client marketing campaigns (content creation, campaign coordination, copywriting).



You will work closely with the founders, the Media Buyer, and the Ad Creative Designer to produce marketing content and coordinate campaigns across multiple channels.



---



## What You Will Do



**Zelix Labs brand (approximately 40% of time):**



- Create and manage content for Zelix Labs' social media channels (LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok)

- Write case studies and client success stories based on real campaign data

- Help produce thought leadership content about AI in marketing, WhatsApp business automation, and SMB growth

- Support lead generation campaigns — manage ad copy, landing page content, and
 sequences

- Maintain and update the Zelix Labs website content



**Client marketing support (approximately 60% of time):**



- Write ad copy for client campaigns across Meta, Google, and TikTok (working alongside AI tools)

- Create content calendars and WhatsApp campaign schedules for clients

- Coordinate with the Ad Creative Designer on visual assets for campaigns

- Write website copy for client landing pages and site builds

- Help prepare client proposals and strategy documents using our internal templates

- Research competitors, market trends, and seasonal opportunities for client verticals



---



## What We Are Looking For



**Must have:**



- 2+ years of experience in digital marketing, content marketing, or a similar role

- Strong copywriting skills — you can write ad copy, social media posts, website copy, and longer-form content (case studies, articles)

- Understanding of social media platforms and content best practices

- Comfortable working with data — you can read a campaign report and turn the key findings into a compelling story

- Good research skills — you can quickly learn about a new industry or vertical and write credibly about it

- Excellent written English — this is a content-heavy role

- Organised and able to manage multiple projects with different deadlines



**Nice to have:**



- Experience writing for Singapore or Southeast Asian audiences

- Experience with AI writing tools (ChatGPT or similar) and willingness to use them as part of your workflow

- Basic understanding of paid advertising (Meta Ads, Google Ads)

- Experience with
 marketing tools (Mailchimp, Brevo, or similar)

- Experience creating content for B2B services or professional services

- Basic design skills (Canva, Figma) for creating simple social media visuals

- Knowledge of SEO and content optimisation



---



## What We Provide



- Premium AI tools subscription for AI-assisted copywriting, research, and content creation

- Internal templates for proposals, case studies, and campaign plans

- Exposure to multiple verticals and industries — dental, automotive, beauty, home services, F&B, and more

- Direct mentorship from the founders

- A growing company where you can shape the marketing function from early stage



---



## Compensation



?25,000 – ?47,000/month (approximately SGD 530 – 1,000) depending on experience.



This role has strong growth potential. As Zelix Labs scales, this could evolve into a Marketing Manager or Content Lead position.



---



## How to Apply



Please include:



1. A short Loom video (3–5 minutes) walking us through a piece of marketing content you created — an ad campaign, a social media strategy, or a case study. Explain the goal, your approach, and the outcome. This is the single most important part of your application.

2. Your OnlineJobs.ph profile link

3. 2–3 writing samples — ideally a mix of short-form (ad copy or social post) and long-form (article, case study, or blog post)

4. Links to any social media accounts or brands you have managed

5. A brief note on how you would approach building a social media presence for a B2B agency from scratch

6. Your availability to start
