title: Web Designer
description:
## About Zelix Labs



Zelix Labs is a Singapore-based digital growth agency that helps SMBs across Southeast Asia grow through AI-powered marketing automation, WhatsApp business messaging, and paid advertising. We build high-converting websites and landing pages for our clients as part of our growth service packages.



Our web builds are powered by a unique workflow: we use advanced AI tools with custom design systems and web standards that we have developed in-house. This means you will be producing websites faster and at higher quality than most agencies — but you still need strong design sense and coding ability to guide the AI and refine the output.



---



## The Role



You will build and maintain client websites and landing pages — primarily single-page marketing sites, multi-page business sites, and high-converting ad landing pages. Most builds are HTML/CSS/JS deployed on Cloudflare Pages.



You will work with our internal design system and AI-powered skills to generate initial builds, then refine them with your own design judgement and coding skills. This is not a template-dragging role — we build custom, high-quality sites that look and perform like premium agency work.



---



## What You Will Do



- Build client websites and landing pages from briefs — typically 1-page to 5-page sites for Singapore SMBs

- Use AI tools with our custom web standards and design system to generate initial code, then refine and polish the output

- Ensure all builds meet our standards: mobile-first responsive design, Core Web Vitals performance (LCP, CLS, INP), SEO best practices, proper meta tags, and schema markup

- Implement WhatsApp click-to-chat buttons, sticky CTAs, contact forms, and conversion tracking

- Maintain and update existing client sites — content changes, design tweaks, new sections

- Collaborate with the Media Buyer to ensure landing pages align with ad campaigns (messaging match, conversion tracking)

- Deploy sites to Cloudflare Pages and manage DNS/hosting configurations

- QA all builds across devices (iPhone Safari, Android Chrome, desktop) before client review

- Follow and contribute to our internal web standards documentation



---



## What We Are Looking For



**Must have:**



- 2+ years of experience building marketing websites or landing pages

- Strong HTML, CSS, and JavaScript skills — you can hand-code a responsive page from scratch

- Good visual design sense — you understand typography, spacing, colour, and layout principles

- Experience with mobile-first responsive design

- Understanding of page speed optimisation (image compression, lazy loading, font loading, minimal render-blocking resources)

- Comfortable with Git or similar version control

- Portfolio showing at least 5 sites or landing pages you have built (links or screenshots)

- Good written English for communication with the team



**Nice to have:**



- Experience with Cloudflare Pages, Netlify, or Vercel for deployment

- Understanding of SEO fundamentals (meta tags, heading structure, schema markup, OG tags)

- Experience with Google Tag Manager and conversion tracking implementation

- Familiarity with AI tools (ChatGPT, Cursor, or similar) for code generation

- Experience with animation libraries or CSS animations (scroll-triggered reveals, micro-interactions)

- Experience building sites for Singapore or Southeast Asian businesses

- Basic understanding of Figma or design tools for reviewing design references



---



## What We Provide



- Premium AI tools subscription with access to our custom design system, web standards, animated components library, SEO/AEO skill, and performance optimisation skill — these dramatically accelerate your workflow

- Clear web standards documentation covering typography, spacing, animations, copywriting frameworks, and mobile requirements

- Design pattern library with five pre-built patterns suited to different verticals and client types

- Cloudflare Pages deployment pipeline — no complex hosting setup to manage

- Training on our workflow and standards from the founders

- Autonomy — once you understand our standards, you will own the full build process



---



## Compensation



?33,000 – ?56,000/month (approximately SGD 700 – 1,200) depending on experience.



This is a long-term role. As the client base grows, there will be opportunity to take on more complex projects and potentially lead a small web team.



---



## How to Apply



Please include:



1. A short Loom video (3–5 minutes) walking us through one website or landing page you built — show the live site, explain your design decisions, how you handled mobile responsiveness, and any performance optimisations you made. This is the single most important part of your application.

2. Your OnlineJobs.ph profile link

3. Links to 3–5 websites or landing pages you have built (live links preferred, screenshots accepted)

4. A brief description of your typical build process — tools you use, how long a typical landing page takes you, and how you handle mobile responsiveness

5. Your experience with any AI coding tools

6. Your availability to start
